6:70.t: Eoo wid irran ddin nnsen d urar, d aqesseĂŽ. T$uĂŽĂŽ iten tmeddurt n ddunit. Mmekti d yis, ard a ipwaĂźĂźef umdan $ef wayen ikseb. Ur isĂąi, war Ăebbi, bab ne$ amcafaĂą. Yal le$ĂŽama ur tepwaqbal segs. Widak d wid ipwaĂźfen $ef wayen kesben. I nitni tissit iĂŽ$an, aĂąaqeb aqeĂŽĂȘan, ilmend n wayen la jehlen.

6:71.t: Ini: "day a nĂąaĂŽ, war Ăebbi, ayen ur a$ neneffaĂą, ur a$ neĂźĂźuĂŽĂŽu? U a nu$al a nwexxeĂŽ, deffir nnhaya n Ăebbi, am win $ewwan ccwaĂźen di tmurt, u ippuĂȘeyyeĂŽ". Pnecciden t imeddukwal ar nnhaya: "yya $uĂŽne$"! Ini: "d nnhaya n Ăebbi, s tidep, ay d nnhaya. NepwameĂŽ a nanez i Mass imavalen".

6:72.t: ĂšĂ©alet, ĂȘezzbet aS. ÂŁuĂŽeS, Neppa, ara tepwafessrem.

6:73.t: D Neppa i Ixelqen tamurt akked igenwan, s tidep. Ass ideg ara Yini: "ili"! Ad yili. Awal iS d tidep. IneS tagelda. Ass uĂ»uvu n lbuq, IĂ©ĂŽa i iffren d wayen ivehĂŽen. Neppa d Bab n Ă»Ă»wab, i IĂ©ĂŽan.

6:74.t: Mi inna IbĂŽahim i baba s, AzaĂŽ: "day a pperrev tiĂąancuĂŽin d iĂŽebbiten? Nek wala$ k, keĂ§Ă§ akked ugdud ik, di ttelfan n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ".

6:75.t: Akka, Nessken i IbĂŽahim, tagelda n tmurt akked igenwan, iwakken ad yili seg wid itebbten.

6:76.t: Mi t i$umm yiv, iwala itri, inna: "wagi d Mass iw". Mi ixsi, inna: "ur ĂȘemle$ ara wid ixessin".

6:77.t: Mi iwala iuli d waggur n tziri, inna: "wagi d Mass iw". Mi i$ab, inna: "ma ur iyi Inha ara Mass iw, ad ili$, war ccekk, seg ugdud im$eĂŽĂŽqen".

6:78.t: Mi iwala iĂźij ineqqeĂŽ ed, inna: "wagi d Mass iw, wagi meqqweĂŽ kteĂŽ". Mi i$li, inna: "a yagdud iw! Nek rri$ akkin ayen tepcarakem.

6:79.t: Nek zzi$ udem iw ar Win Ixelqen tamurt akked igenwan, male$ ar tidep. Ur lli$, nek, seg imcurak".

6:80.t: IxuĂ»em it ugdud is, inna: "day ad iyi txaĂ»mem $ef Ăebbi? Ni$ Inha yi; ur ugade$ ayen i S tcurkem, siwa ma illa wayen i S ihwan i Mass iw. Tussna n Mass iw tezdi yal cci, day ur d tesmektayem ara?

6:81.t: Amek ara ugade$ ayen tepcarakem, ur tugadem mi kunwi tepcarakem, i Ăebbi, ayen iwumi ur d Issers adabu fellawen? Anwa, ger sin ikabaran, i iklalen laman, maday tessnem"?

6:82.t: Wid iumnen, ur sselsen ddens i liman nnsen, widak ad ilin di laman, u nitni pwanhan.

6:83.t: D wagi ay d awal nneÂŁ. Nefka yas t i IbĂŽahim, mgal agdud is. Nessalay tiseddaĂŽin, win iÂŁ ÂŁ ihwan. Ih, Mass ik d Bab n Ă»Ă»wab, d Amusnaw.

6:84.t: Nefka yas IsĂȘaq akked YaĂąqub. I sin, Nenha ten. Nenha, zik, NuĂȘ akw, ger tarwa s, Dawed, Sliman, Yub, Yusef, Musa, HaĂŽun, - Akka ay Nepkafi iĂąaĂŽviyen -

6:85.t: Zakarya, YeĂȘya, Ăisa, Ilyas, - akw seg iĂąaĂŽviyen -

6:86.t: IsmaĂąil, LyasĂąa, Yunes, LuĂź, - akw Nesmenyaf iten $ef imavalen -

6:87.t: akw seg ibabaten nnsen, si tarwa nnsen, akked watmaten nnsen. Nefren iten, u Nebbwi ten d ubrid uwqim.

6:88.t: Tagi d nnhaya n Ăebbi. Inehhu yis win i S ihwan, deg imdanen iS. Lemmer curken, war ccekk, ad asen imĂȘu wayen xeddmen.

6:89.t: D wigi iwumi d Nebbwi Tazmamt, Ă»Ă»wab, akked lambiyya. Ma jehlen widak yis, ihi, Nekwni Nwekkel ip i ugdud ur njehhel yis.

6:90.t: Wigi d wid Inha Ăebbi. Ddu d nnhaya nnsen. Ini: "ur awen suture$, fellas, taqdiĂąt. Neppa d asmekti kan i imavalen".

6:91.t: Ur qudĂŽen Ăebbi azal n lqedĂŽ iS, mi qqaĂŽen: "ur d Issers Ăebbi acemma ar umdan". Ini: "anwa id Issersen Tazmamt, id ibbwi Musa, d tafat u d nnhaya i medden? Tepparam p di lkwa$ev i tesskanem. AĂźas ay teppeffrem. Tlemdem ayen ur tessinem, kunwi akked imezwura nnwen". Ini: "D Ăebbi". Sinna, anef asen ad uraren s nnmara nnsen.

6:92.t: Tagi d Tazmamt, Nessers ip id teĂŽqa, a ptebbet ayen ip id izwaren, a ppendeĂŽ tayimmap n temdinin akked wayen i s d izzin. Wid iumnen s laxeĂŽt, umnen yis. Nitni bedden i tĂ©illa nnsen.

6:93.t: Anwa idensen sennig win d igren tikerkas $ef Ăebbi? Ne$ inna: "ppuweĂȘĂȘa$ d", ur as d ippuweĂȘĂȘa wacemma? U win innan: "a d sserse$ am wayen id Issers Ăebbi"? Lemmer a pwaliv imednas, di maylellif n tmeppant, u lmalayek Ă©lent ed ifassen nnsent: "ssuff$et ed tiĂŽwiĂȘin nnwen. Assa, a ppeppuqeĂźĂźim s uĂąaqeb isneĂȘcamen, ilmend n wayen teqqaĂŽem $ef Ăebbi, ur d tidep. U tellam tessem$waĂŽem iman nnwen, $ef issekniyen iS".

6:94.t: Ni$ tusam aÂŁ d, d ifĂŽiden, akken ikwen Nexleq abrid amezwaru. Teooam deffir wen, ayen i wen Nefka. Ur Nwala, $uĂŽwen, imcafĂąen nnwen, wid i tĂąabdem, nitni, d icriken nnwen. Ni$ temfaĂŽaqem, u ooan kwen wid la tĂąabdem.

6:95.t: Ăebbi, s tidep, IfeĂŽĂŽec aĂąqqa, i$es. Issuffu$ ed amuddir si lmegget. Issuffu$ ed lmegget seg umuddir. Akka ay d Ăebbi. Acimi tugim?

6:96.t: Issenkar tafrara. Irra iv i ureyyeĂȘ, iĂźij d waggur i leĂȘsab. D wagi ay d aseyyi n Uzmir, Amusnaw.

6:97.t: D Neppa i wen Irran itran, ad awen mlen abrid, di tillas n lberr akked yill. Ni$ Nemmal issekniyen i ugdud issnen.

6:98.t: D Neppa ikwen id Ixelqen si yiman afĂŽid, sinna: amkan, tarusi. Ni$ Nemmal issekniyen i ugdud ifehhmen.

6:99.t: D Neppa id Isrusun aman seg igenni. Nessuffu$ ed yissen yal im$an. Nessuffu$ ed yissen tizzegzewt. Nessuffu$ ed yissen iĂąaqqayen mbabben, iguza n ppmeĂŽ id ipĂ»ubbun si tezdayin, leonanat n tfeĂŽĂŽant, uzemmur, n ĂŽemman, ppemcabin ne$ ur ppemcabin. Walit ppemĂŽa nnsen mi d teffe$ tebbwa. Ih, deg waya, war ccekk, issekniyen i ugdud iumnen.

6:100.t: Rran i Ăebbi, leonun d icriken, u Ixelq iten. Snulfan aS d arrac, tullas, ur Ă©ĂŽin. Gedha s yiS! Ay AĂąlay sennig wayen d qqaĂŽen!

6:101.t: Axellaq n tmurt akked igenwan, amek ara IsĂąu mmi S, ur IsĂąi tameddakwelt? U Ixleq yal cci, u Neppa, yal cci, Issen it.

6:102.t: D wagi ay d Ăebbi, Mass nnwen, ur illi ĂŽebbi siwa Neppa. Ixleq yal cci, ihi Ăąabdet eP. Neppa d Awkil n yal cci.

6:103.t: Ur T tepsami tmu$li. Neppa Ipsami tamu$li. Neppa d LaĂźif, i IzĂŽan.

6:104.t: Ni$ iusa kwen id ara twalim, s$uĂŽ Mass nnwen. Win iwalan, i iman is; win idre$len, mgal is. Ur lli$ nek d amĂȘareb nnwen.

6:105.t: Akka ay Nessefham issekniyen, iwakken ad inin: "tlemdev", iwakken a t Nbeggen i ugdud issnen.

6:106.t: Ddu d wayen ik ed ippuweĂȘĂȘan, s$uĂŽ Mass ik; ur illi ĂŽebbi siwa Neppa. Eoo imcurak.

6:107.t: Lemmer i S ihwi i Ăebbi, ur curken. Ur k Nerra d amĂȘareb nnsen, ur telliv d awkil nnsen.

6:108.t: Ur naĂąlet wid u$uĂŽ la pnujun, war Ăebbi. AxaĂźeĂŽ ad naĂąlen Ăebbi, s lbe$wv, war tamusni. Akka ay NcebbeĂȘ igiten is i yal lois. Sinna, ar Mass nnsen, tu$alin nnsen; a ten IxebbeĂŽ $ef wayen xeddmen.

6:109.t: Ggulen s Ăebbi, tagalit meqqwĂŽen, ar ma iusa ten id ussekni, ar ad amnen yis. Ini: "issekniyen ar Ăebbi kan". Acu i kwen irran tĂȘussem ar, xas ma iusa ten id, ur ppamnen?

6:110.t: A Neppi ulawen nnsen, d yiĂ©ĂŽi nnsen, akken ur uminen yis abrid amezwaru. A ten Neoo di lbe$wv nnsen, d ider$alen.

6:111.t: Xas Nekwni Nessers asen d lmalayek, u mmeslayen asen d lmeggtin, u Nefser asen d, yal cci, zdat sen, ur ppamnen, siwa ma ihwa yaS i Ăebbi. Maca, aĂźas degsen ur ssinen.

6:112.t: Akka ay Nerra, i yal nnbi, acengu. CcwaĂźen, seg imdanen akw si leonun, ppemweĂȘĂȘin garasen awal uziyn i u$uĂŽĂŽu. Lemmer i S ihwi, i Mass ik, ur p xeddmen. Ihi, eoo iten ar wayen d snulfuyen,

6:113.t: iwakken ad mmalen $uĂŽes ulawen n wid ur numin s laxeĂŽt, a t ĂŽavin, ad gemren ayen zerĂąen.

6:114.t: Day b$i$ amĂȘaddi, war Ăebbi? D Neppa i wen d Issersen Tazmamt, s ussefhem. Wid iwumi Nefka Tazmamt, Ă©ĂŽan, ar neppat, ters ed s$uĂŽ Mass ik, s tidep. Ur ppili seg wid ipcukkun.

6:115.t: Awal n Mass ik ibbwev, s tidep akked lmizan. Ur illi ubeddel deg wawal iS. Neppa Issel, d Amusnaw.

6:116.t: Ma tu$ev awal i tegwti n wid illan di tmurt, a k telfen seg ubrid n Ăebbi. Teddun kan d wayen nwan. Nitni snulfuyen d kan.

6:117.t: Ih, Mass ik Issen sennig akw, anwi innetlafen seg ubrid iS. Neppa Issen sennig akw, anwi ipwanhan.

6:118.t: EĂ§Ă§et ayen i$ef d immekti isem n Ăebbi, ma tumnem s issekniyen iS.

6:119.t: Acu ikwen iu$en, ur teppeppem ara seg wayen i$ef d immekti isem n Ăebbi? Ni$ Issfehm awen ayen i wen Igdel, siwa ma ipwaĂȘeppem fellawen. Ih, aĂźas ay tellifen, s zzhu nnsen, war tussna. Ni$ Mass ik Iugar akw akken Issen wid izegren tilas.

6:120.t: Ekkset abekkav uvhiĂŽ akked uffir. Ih, wid ibbwin abekkav, ad ppuqeĂźĂźin $ef wayen xeddmen.

6:121.t: Ur teppet ayen i$ef ur d immekti ara, isem n Ăebbi. Ih, ayagi d ixmiĂŽ. Ih, ccwaĂźen pweĂȘĂȘin i imeddukwal nnsen, a kwen namren. Ma tu$em asen awal, kunwi, s tidep, tcurkem.

6:122.t: Ma win illan d lmegget, Nessider it id, Nga yas tafat, iteddu yis ger medden, day d amedya s, win illan di tillas, ur izmir ad iffe$ segsent. Akka, ippucebbeĂȘ i ijehliyen, wayen xeddmen.

6:123.t: Akka ay Nerra, ad ppandin di yal tamdint, ibe$wviyen is, uqsiĂȘen mavi. Ppandin kan i iman nnsen, ur faqen.

6:124.t: Ma iusa ten id ussekni, ad inin: "ur neppamen, alamma iusa ya$ d ayen id iusan ar imazanen n Ăebbi". Ăebbi Yif akw akken Issen, anida ara Ifk tabĂŽap iS. Ad iĂŽxisen, ar Ăebbi, wid ibe$wven. Fellasen aĂąaqeb uqsiĂȘ, ilmend n wayen ppandin.

6:125.t: Win Ib$a Ăebbi a t Inhu, ad illi idmaren is ar wannuz. Win Ib$a a t Itlef, ad Irr idmaren is deyqen, tĂȘeyyĂŽen, amzun ippaĂąĂŽav ad iali s igenni. Akka i Ippara Ăebbi axerwaĂą i wid ur numin.

6:126.t: Wagi d abrid uwqim n Mass ik. Ni$ Nessefham issekniyen i ugdud ismektayen.

6:127.t: I nitni, axxam n tifrat ar Mass nnsen. Neppa d Bab nnsen, $ef wayen xeddmen.

6:128.t: Ass ideg ara ten Ifser meĂŽĂŽa: "a yagraw n leonun, ni$ tcerrĂąem deg imdanen"? A d inin imawlan nnsen, seg imdanen: "a Mass nne$! Kra segne$ $elten si kra, Nebbwev ar lajel nne$, i $ Terriv". Inna: "d times ay d tanezdu$t nnwen, ad degs twekkĂŽem, siwa ma ur aS ihwi i Ăebbi". Ih, Mass ik d Bab n Ă»Ă»wab, d Amusnaw.

6:129.t: Akka ay Neppara kra imednas d iĂȘbiben n kra, ilmend n wayen keppben.

6:130.t: "A yagraw n leonun d yimdanen, day ur kwen id usan ara imazanen segwen? Mmalen awen issekniyen iW, nedĂŽen kwen $ef temlilit n wass nnwen agi". Nnan d: "ncehhed $ef yiman nne$". T$uĂŽĂŽ iten tmeddurt n ddunit. Cehhden $ef yiman nnsen ar nitni, s tidep, llan d ijehliyen.

6:131.t: Akka, acku Mass ik ur Isquccu tamdint, s ddens, ma llan imezda$ is d i$wefliyen.

6:132.t: I yal yiwen, tiseddarin seg wayen ixdem. Ur I$effel Mass ik $ef wayen xeddmen.

6:133.t: Mass ik d AsĂąay, d Bab uĂȘunu. Ma ihwa yaS a kwen Ikkes, a d InĂ»ef, deffir wen, ayen i S ihwan, akken ikwen id Ixleq si tarwa n ugdud nniven.

6:134.t: Ih, ayen i wen ippuĂąahden, a d ias, war ccekk. Ur tezmirem, kunwi, a ppesfunngem.

6:135.t: Ini: "a yagdud iw! Xedmet akken tewĂąam, nek ad xedme$. Deqqal a ppeĂ©ĂŽem iwumi ara telhu taggara n Uxxam". S tidep, ur rebĂȘen imednas.

6:136.t: Gan aS i Ăebbi amur, seg wayen id Ifka n l$ella, akked lmal. Nnan: "wagi i Ăebbi â- di tikta nnsen -, wagi i icriken nne$". Ayen gan i icriken nnsen, ur ippawev ar Ăebbi. Ayen gan i Ăebbi, neppa, ad yawev ar icriken nnsen. I icmet wayen id pĂȘuddun!

6:137.t: Akka ay cebbĂȘen icriken nnsen, i waĂźas n yimcurak, timen$iwt n tarwa nnsen, iwakken a ten squccen, u ad irwi ddin nnsen, fellasen. Lemmer i S ihwi i Ăebbi, ur p xeddmen. Eoo iten ar wayen d snulfuyen.

6:138.t: Nnan: "lmal akked l$ella yagi ppugedlen, ur ten itepp, siwa win i $ ihwan". S tikta nnsen. Lmal iwumi gedlen iĂąrar nnsen, lmal iwumi ur d ppadren fellasen, isem n Ăebbi. D asnulfu mgal iS. A ten IqeĂźĂźi $ef wayen d snulfuyen.

6:139.t: QqaĂŽen: "ayen illan deg iĂąabbav n lmal agi, i ddker nne$ kan, ipwagdel i tlawin nne$". Ma ilul ed immut, ad mlilen $uĂŽes. A ten IqeĂźĂźi $ef wayen d qqaĂŽen. Neppa, s tidep, d Bab n Ă»Ă»wab, d Amusnaw.

6:140.t: Ni$ xesĂŽen wid in$an arraw nnsen. D tiderwect, war tussna. Gedlen ayen i s iten I$at Ăebbi, snulfan d mgal Ăebbi. Ni$ nnetlafen, ur pwanhan.

6:141.t: D Neppa id Ixelqen leonanat s iĂąricen, ne$ war iĂąricen, tizdayin, zerriĂąa n yal Ă»Ă»enf, i wuĂ§Ă§i; azemmur akked rreman ippemcabin, ne$ ur neppemcabi. EĂ§Ă§et si ppemĂŽa nnsen, ma fkan d, efket leĂȘqq is, ass u$ellet nnsen. Ur ssugutet. Neppa, s tidep, ur IĂȘemmel ara wid ipĂȘawalen.

6:142.t: Si lmal, aggway d wussu. EĂ§Ă§et seg wayen ikwen IĂŽĂ©eq Ăebbi. Ur teddut d iberdan n CciĂźan. Neppa, s tidep, d acengu nnwen n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ.

6:143.t: Ăamt tyugiwin, snat u$welmi, snat umĂąiz. Ini: "d sin n ddker i Igdel, ne$ d snat n nnta, ne$ d ayen illan deg iĂąabbav n snat n nnta? XebbĂŽet iyi d, s tussna, ma tessawalem tidep".

6:144.t: Seg ile$wman, snat, seg ubeqĂŽi, snat. Ini: "d sin n ddker i Igdel, ne$ d snat n nnta, ne$ d ayen illan deg iĂąabbav n snat n nnta, ne$ tellam d inagan mi kwen id IweĂ»Ă»a Ăebbi $ef waya"? Anwa idensen sennig win id igren tikerkas $ef Ăebbi, iwakken ad itlef imdanen, ur issin. Ih, Ăebbi ur Inehhu agdud imednas.

6:145.t: Ini: "ur ufi$ ipwagdel a t iĂ§Ă§ yiwen, deg wayen iyi d ippuweĂȘĂȘan, siwa ma illa d loifa, ne$ d idim immaren, ne$ d aksum n yilef - wagi, war ccekk, d lewsex -, ne$ ĂźĂȘegga s d$wel i war Ăebbi. Win i$ef ippuĂȘeppem, ur ib$i, ur ib$wiv, Mass ik, s tidep, IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

6:146.t: I wudayen, Negdel ayen akw isĂąan acaren, seg ubeqĂŽi akked u$welmi, Negdel asen tassemt nnsen, siwa tin n iĂąrar nnsen, iĂąabbav, akked wayen ipwaxelven akked i$san. Akka ay ten Nepkafi, ilmend n ĂźĂźeĂŽĂŽ nnsen. Nekwni, war ccekk, d At Tidep.

6:147.t: Ma skaddben k, ini: "Mass nnwen d Bab uĂȘunu iwsĂąan, ur ipwexxiĂŽ ssexv iS, af ugdud ibe$wviyen".

6:148.t: Ad inin imcurak: "lemmer i S ihwi i Ăebbi, nekwni akked imezwura nne$, ur ncurek, ur negdel acemma". Akka ay skaddben imezwura nnsen, armi jeĂŽĂŽben ssexv nneÂŁ. Ini: "day tesĂąam tussna ar a$ d tesseknem? Teppeddum kan d nnwaya, kunwi tesnulfuyem d kan".

6:149.t: Ini: "n Ăebbi timenna tunĂ»iĂȘin. Lemmer i S ihwi, yili Inha kwen akw".

6:150.t: Ini: "awit ed inagan nnwen, ara icehhden ar Ăebbi Igdel ayagi". Ma cehhden, ur cehhed yidsen. Ur teddu d lhawiyya n wid iskaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, akked wid ur numin s laxeĂŽt, u pparan tanudda i Mass nnsen.

6:151.t: Ini: "yyaw, ad ini$. I wen Igdel Mass nnwen: ur aS tepcarakem acemma; elhut ar imawlan nnwen; ur neqqet tarwa nnwen, di tigullelt - d Nekwni ara kwen IĂŽeĂ©qen yidsen -, ur ppaĂ©et ar lĂąaĂŽ, d uvhiĂŽ ne$ d uffir; ur neqqet amdan, d ayen Igdel Ăebbi, siwa ma s lĂȘeqq". Ar waya i kwen IweĂ»Ă»a, amar a pfehmem.

6:152.t: Ur pqeĂŽĂŽibet s ayla ugujil, siwa s wayen ilhan, alamma immeĂȘtel. Weznet, ktilet s lewqama. Ur Nepkellif amdan siwa ar wayen iwumi izmer. Ma thedĂŽem d, weznet, xas ma $eĂŽ llzem nnwen. QadĂŽet lemĂąahda n Ăebbi. IweĂ»Ă»a kwen $ef waya, amar a d temmektim.

6:153.t: D wagi ay d abrid iW uwqim, ddut degs. Ur teddut d iberdan ara kwen isĂźixĂŽen seg ubrid iS. IweĂ»Ă»a kwen $ef waya, amar a pĂȘezzbem.

6:154.t: Sinna, Nefka Tazmamt i Musa. Tewqem i wid imaĂąnen, tfeĂ»Ă»el yal cci, d nnhaya u d aĂȘunu. Amar ad amnen s timlilit n Mass nnsen.

6:155.t: Tagi d Tazmamt, Nessers ip id, teĂŽqa. Ihi, ddut yides, ĂȘezzbet, amar fellawen aĂȘunu.

6:156.t: Ur d teqqaĂŽem ara: "ters ed kan Tezmamt $eĂŽ sin leoyus, uqbel nne$, ur neĂ©ĂŽi d acu sselmaden".

Anwa idensen sennig win iskaddben issekniyen n Ăebbi, u iooa iten? A NqeĂźĂźi wid iooan issekniyen nneÂŁ, s yir aĂąaqeb, ilmend n wayen la ppaooan.

7:90.t: Nnan imvebbĂŽen, wid ijehlen, n ugdud is: "ma teddam d CuĂąayeb, war ccekk a pxesĂŽem."

7:91.t: Tewwet iten zzenzla, gwran d, deg ixxamen nnsen, d loeppat.

7:92.t: Wid iskaddben CuĂąayeb, u$alen amzun ur zdi$en. Wid iskaddben CuĂąayeb, d nitni ay d imexĂ»uĂŽen.

7:93.t: IwexxeĂŽ asen, u inna: "a yagdud iw! Ni$ ssawve$ awen d tibĂŽatin n Mass iw, neĂ»ĂȘe$ kwen. Amek ara $weble$ $ef ugdud ijehliyen"?

7:94.t: Ur Nuzen ara nnbi ar temdint, mebla ma Newwet imezda$ is s cedda, akked lemveĂŽĂŽa, amar ad ĂȘiwten.

7:95.t: Sinna, Nerra ise$ deg umkan n tucmip, armi wexxĂŽen, nnan: "ni$ jeĂŽĂŽben imezwura nne$ lemveĂŽĂŽa akked ttrika". Newwet iten deqzalla, nitni ur bnin.

7:96.t: Lemmer kan uminen u ĂȘezzben imezda$ n temdinin, war ccekk, ad asen Nelli lbaĂŽakat seg igenni akked tmurt. Maca, skaddben. NessemĂȘalleq asen, ilmend n wayen keppben.

7:97.t: Day $ilen imezda$ n temdinin, ur ten id teppawev tiyta nneÂŁ, deg yiv, nitni ĂźĂźsen?

7:98.t: Ne$ day $ilen imezda$ n temdinin, ur ten id teppawev tiyta nneÂŁ, deg wazal, nitni ppuraren?

7:99.t: Day $ilen sellken i tandit n Ăebbi? Siwa agdud i ixesĂŽen, i i$ilen sellken i tandit n Ăebbi.

7:100.t: Ne$ day ur d Iban ara, i wid ara iweĂŽten tamurt, deffir imezda$ is, ar, ma ihwa yaÂŁ, a ten Newwet $ef ibekkaven nnsen, a Nesle$ ulawen nnsen, d$a nitni ur sellen?

7:101.t: D timdinin agi, i$ef ak NĂȘekku, si teqĂ»ivin nnsent. Ni$ usan $uĂŽsent imazanen nnsent, s ubeggen. Ur llint d tid ara iamnen deg wayen skaddbent uqbel. Akka i Iselle$ Ăebbi ulawen ijehliyen.

7:102.t: Ur Nufi nnesba ar tegwti nnsen. Nufa, tegwti nnsen, d iballa$en.

7:103.t: Sinna, deffir sen, Nuzen ed Musa, s issekniyen nneÂŁ, ar FerĂąun akked imvebbĂŽen is. Densen ten. Wali amek tevĂŽa d ifessaden.

7:104.t: Inna Musa: "a FerĂąun! Nek d amazan s$uĂŽ Mass imavalen.

7:105.t: D Ă»Ă»eĂȘ, ur qqaĂŽe$, $ef Ăebbi, siwa tidep. Ih, usi$ kwen id, s ubeggen n Mass nnwen. Ihi, azen yidi At IsĂŽail".

7:106.t: Inna: "ma tusiv d s ussekni, zzi t id, ma tessawalav tidep".

7:107.t: IveggeĂŽ taĂąkwazt is, appan d azrem n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ.

7:108.t: Issuffe$ ed afus is, iban ed d amellal i imnezhen.

7:109.t: Nnan d imvebbĂŽen n ugdud n FerĂąun: "wagi, s tidep, d aseĂȘĂȘar amusnaw".

7:110.t: "Ib$a a kwen issuffe$ si tmurt nnwen, d acu t lameĂŽ nnwen"?

7:111.t: Nnan: "anef as, neppa akked gma s. Azen iberraĂȘen ar temdinin,

7:112.t: ad ak d awin yal aseĂȘĂȘar amusnaw".

7:113.t: Usan d iseĂȘĂȘaren n FerĂąun, nnan: "s tidep, ad a$ tkafiv, ma d nekwni ara i$elben"?

7:114.t: Inna: "ih, u, s tidep, a ppilim d iqĂŽiben".

7:115.t: Nnan: "a Musa! A pveggĂŽev keĂ§Ă§, ne$ a nveggeĂŽ nekwni"?

7:116.t: Inna: "veggĂŽet"! Mi veggĂŽen, sdehcen allen n l$aci, ssagwden ten. Bbwin d ssĂȘur anect ilat.

7:117.t: NweĂȘĂȘa i Musa: "veggeĂŽ taĂąkwazt ik"! Apan tesseblaĂą ayen d Ă»enĂąan.

7:119.t: Akka ay pwa$elben. U$alen ar deffir, d unqisen.

7:123.t: Inna FerĂąun: "day tumnem yis, uqbel ma Ăąammde$ awen? Ayagi, war ccekk, d tifxep. Tundim p di temdint, iwakken a ppessuff$em, segs, imezda$ is. Ihi, deqqal a ppeĂ©ĂŽem.

7:124.t: War ccekk, ad awen gezme$ afus ssya, avaĂŽ ssya. Sinna, ih, a kwen semmĂŽe$ akw $ef imudag".

7:125.t: Nnan: "nekwni a nu$al ar Mass nne$.

7:126.t: Terriv d ppaĂŽ segne$, imi kan numen s issekniyen n Mass nne$, mi $ d usan. A Mass nne$! Azen a$ d Ă»Ă»beĂŽ, Ddem leĂŽwaĂȘ nne$ d imvuĂąen".

7:127.t: ImvebbĂŽen n ugdud n FerĂąun, nnan: "day a ppeooev Musa akked ugdud is, ad ssefsaden di tmurt, a kwen ooen, keĂ§Ă§ akked iĂŽebbiten ik"? Inna: "a nene$ arrac nnsen, a nessider tilawin nnsen. Nekwni, sennig sen, d iqehhaĂŽen".

7:128.t: Inna Musa i ugdud is: "ppret afus n Ăebbi, u Ă»ebĂŽet. Tamurt, war ccekk, n Ăebbi. A p iwĂŽet win i S ihwan, deg imdanen iS. Taggara i wid ipĂȘezziben".

7:129.t: Nnan: "njaf uqbel a $ d tasev, u deffir tisin ik". Inna: "amar Mass nnwen ad Ine$ acengu nnwen, a kwen Irr d igensas di tmurt, ad Iwali amek ara txedmem".

7:130.t: Newwet, d$a, lois n FerĂąun s iseggwasen n llaĂ©, akked nneqs n ppemĂŽa, amar a d mmektin.

7:131.t: Ma iusa ten id ise$, ad inin: "nne$ wagi". Ma tusa ten id tucmip, a p sbibben i Musa akked wid illan yides. Ayen iveĂŽĂŽun yidsen, day maĂ§Ă§i ar Ăebbi kan? Maca, tegwti segsen ur ssinen.

7:132.t: Nnan: " wicqa assekni ara d tawiv, ur a$ tepseĂȘĂȘirev yis. Nekwni, ur neppamen yisek".

7:133.t: Nuzen asen aĂȘemmal, ajĂŽad, tilkin, imqweĂŽqwĂŽen, idammen, d issekniyen ifeĂ»len. Sme$wĂŽen iman nnsen. Llan d agdud ibe$wviyen.

7:134.t: Mi tevĂŽa yidsen twa$it, qqaĂŽen: "a Musa! NĂąaĂŽ Mass ik i nekwni, s wayen i k IĂąahed. Ma tekksev a$ tawa$it, a namen yisek, a nazen yidek At IsĂŽail".

7:135.t: Mi sen Nekkes tawa$it, ar lajel iten iggunin, atnan nitni xedĂąan.

7:136.t: Nerra d segsen ppaĂŽ, N$emq iten deg ill, imi skaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, ur d celĂąen degsen.

7:137.t: NessewĂŽet i ugdud i illan qehĂŽen t, igmav akked ituram n tmurt, i NeĂŽqa. Itam wawal Ă»Ă»am n Mass ik, $ef At IsĂŽail, ilmend n wayen Ă»ebĂŽen. Nhudd ayen iĂ»ennaĂą FerĂąun akked ugdud is, u wayen bennun.

7:138.t: NesĂąadda ill i At IsĂŽail. Mmugren d agdud i iĂąabden tiĂąancuĂŽin is. Nnan: "a Musa! Err ane$ ĂŽebbi am iĂŽebbiten nnsen". Inna: "kunwi, s tidep, d agdud ur nessin.

7:139.t: Wigi, s tidep, ad inger wayen ideg llan, ad inqev wayen xeddmen".

7:140.t: Inna: "day awen budde$ ĂŽebbi, war Ăebbi, u Neppa Ismenyaf ikwen $ef imavalen"?

7:141.t: Mi kwen Nsellek si lois n FerĂąun, sukken fellawen aĂąaqeb uqsiĂȘ mavi; neqqen arrac nnwen, ssidiren tilawin nnwen. Deg waya, ajeĂŽĂŽeb s$uĂŽ Mass nnwen ameqwĂŽaĂȘan.

7:142.t: Nemlal akked Musa kravet wavan, Nerna yasen mraw. Tebbwev tallit n Mass is, kuzet wavan. Inna Musa i gma s HaĂŽun: "enĂ»ef iyi ar ugdud iw, exdem ayen ilhan, ur teddu d ubrid ifessaden".

7:143.t: Mi d iusa Musa ar temlilit nneÂŁ, u Immeslay as Mass is, inna: "a Mass iw! SsenĂąat iyi d, a K wali$". Inna d: "ur iyI tepwaliv, d awez$i, maca muqel s adrar. Ma iqqim deg umekkan is, ad iyI twaliv". Mi d Iusa Mass is s adrar, Irra t d saĂȘel. I$li Musa, ixsef. Mi d iuki, inna: "gedha s yiseK! Utube$ K, nek d amezwaru n lmumnin".

7:144.t: Inna: "a Musa! Aql I Smenyafe$ k $ef imdanen, i tebĂŽatin iW, i wawal iW. Ddem ayen i k d Fki$, ili seg wid isnemmiren".

7:145.t: Nura yas, di tlewĂȘin, si yal cci, anabi akked ufeĂ»Ă»el n yal cci. Ddem itent s tezmert, ameĂŽ i ugdud ik a tent iĂźĂźef s lmaĂąna nnsent. Ad awen Ssekne$ tanezdu$t iballa$en.

7:146.t: Ad VeĂŽĂŽfe$, seg issekniyen iW, wid isme$wĂŽen iman nnsen di tmurt, war ssebba. Mi walan yal assekni, ur ppamnen yis. Ma walan abrid uĂ»wib, ur teddun degs. Ma walan abrid n le$wlav, a t awin. Ayagi, acku, s tidep, skaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, ur d celĂąen degsen.

7:147.t: Wid iskaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, akked temlilit n laxeĂŽt, ur swin igiten nnsen. Day a ten kafin $ef wayen ur nelli d ayen xeddmen?

7:148.t: Agdud n Musa, deffir es, isbedd, s ĂŽĂŽĂȘuĂȘ is, aĂąjmi bu loeppa isrugmuten. Day ur walan ara ar, s tidep, ur asen d ipmeslay, ur la ten inehhu s abrid? Ăabden t, llan d imednas.

7:149.t: Mi ppuĂȘeccmen, u walan ar, zi$ nnetlafen, nnan: "ma ur IĂȘun ara fella$ Mass nne$, ma ur a$ IsemmeĂȘ ara, war ccekk, a nu$al seg imexsuĂŽen".

7:150.t: Mi d iu$al Musa ar ugdud is, s wurrif akked lĂȘemĂ»a, inna: "ay d ucmit wayen is iyi tneĂ»fem, deffir iw! Teb$am a d i$iwwel lameĂŽ n Mass nnwen"? IveggeĂŽ tilewĂȘin, iĂźĂźef gma s seg uqeĂŽĂŽu, ijebt it id $uĂŽes. Inna d: "a mmi s n yimma, s tidep, iĂȘqeĂŽ iyi ugdud, qĂŽib iyi n$an. Ur ssefĂŽaĂȘ icenga yissi. Ur iyi pparra seg ugdud imednas".

7:151.t: Inna: "a Mass iw! SemmeĂȘ ane$, nek akked gma, Ssekcem a$ ar uĂȘunu K. KeĂ§Ă§, Tifev akw wid ipĂȘunun".

7:152.t: Ih, wid iĂąabden aĂąajmi, a d i$li fellasen wurrif n Mass nnsen, ad ndellen di tmeddurt n ddunit. Akka ay NepqeĂźĂźi wid id isnulfuyen.

7:153.t: Wid ixedmen tucmitin, sinna, steĂŽoĂąen deffir sent, u umnen, Mass ik, s tidep, deffir sent, ar IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

7:154.t: Mi irs wurrif is, iddem ed Musa tilewĂȘin. Di tira nnsent, nnhaya akked uĂȘunu i wid ippagwaden Mass nnsen.

7:155.t: Ifren ed Musa Ă»atet irgazen seg ugdud is, ad mlilen yidneÂŁ. Mi ten tewwet zzenzla, inna: "a Mass iw! Lemmer i K ihwi, yili, iu$ lĂȘal, Ten$iv ten, u Tegliv yissi. Day ad a$ TemĂȘuv, ilmend n wayen xedmen ije$lufen segne$? Wagi d ahewwel iK kan, Tettellifev syis win i K ihwan, Tnehhuv win i K ihwan. KeĂ§Ă§ d Bab nne$, SemmeĂȘ a$, Ăun fella$, KeĂ§Ă§ Tifev akw wid ipsemmiĂȘen.

7:156.t: Aru ya$ ise$ di ddunit, di laxeĂŽt; aql a$ nu$al ed $uĂŽeK". Inna d: "aĂąaqeb iW, a t SĂąaddi$ $ef win iyI ihwan. AĂȘunu W ijemmel yal cci. A t Aru$ i wid ipĂȘezziben, ipzekkin, akked wid iumnen s issekniyen nneÂŁ,

7:157.t: wid iteddun d Umazan, Nnbi ur ne$ĂŽi, i ufan iura $uĂŽsen di TuĂŽa akked Linoil". IumeĂŽ asen d lqanun, Itekkes asen ayen n dir. IĂȘell asen lĂąali, igdel asen dduni. Ikkes asen aruz akked lqid nnsen. Ihi, wid iumnen yis, i t iĂąawnen, i t isellken, iddan d tafat id irsen yides, widak d imerbaĂȘ.

7:158.t: Ini: "a yimdanen! Nek d Amazan n Ăebbi $uĂŽwen meĂŽĂŽa. Neppa, ineS tagelda n tmurt akked igenwan. Ur illi ĂŽebbi siwa Neppa. Issidir, Ineqq". Ihi, amnet s Ăebbi akked Umazan iS, Nnbi ur ne$ĂŽi, i iumnen s Ăebbi akked wawal iS. Ddut yides, amar a ppepwanhum.

7:159.t: Deg ugdud n Musa, arbaĂą iteddu s tidep. U syis ay pĂȘuddun.

7:160.t: NessemfaĂŽaq iten $ef mrawsin laĂąĂŽac, n leoyus. Mi s issuter ugdud is tissit, NweĂȘĂȘa i Musa: ewwet aĂ©ĂŽu s tĂąakwaz ik. F$ent ed segs mrawsnat tliwa; akka, yal amdan iĂ©ĂŽa anda ara issew. Nesbur iten s usigna, Nessers asen d lmenna akked ifeĂŽĂŽuoen: "eĂ§Ă§et seg wayen ilhan, is ikwen N$at". Ur aÂŁ dnisen, maca la ddennisen iman nnsen.

7:161.t: Mi pwanecden: "zed$et di temdint agi, eĂ§Ă§et segs, ayen i wen ihwan, init: "laĂąfu"! Ăaddit di tebburt, s lekni. Ad awen NsemmeĂȘ tuccva nnwen. A Nernu i lĂąuĂ»am".

7:162.t: Wid idensen segsen, neĂ»fen awalen s wid ur nelli d wid i sen nnan. Nuzen asen tiyta seg igenni, ilmend n wayen ddennisen.

7:163.t: Steqsi ten $ef temdint i illan $ef rrif n yill, mi ur d rzin di ssebt, mi ten id usan iselman nnsen, walan ten, ass n ssebt. Ass, war ssebt, ur ten id ppasen. Akka ay ten NjeĂŽĂŽeb, deg wayen ssexsaĂŽen.

7:164.t: Mi d inna lois, segsen: "iwumi la tepnabim agdud ara Isqucc Ăebbi, ne$ ara IĂąaqeb s leqseĂȘ"? Nnan: "d aste$feĂŽ ar Mass nnwen, amar ad ĂȘezzben".

7:165.t: Mi ppun ayen i$ef pwafekkĂŽen, Nsellek wid itekksen ayen n dir, NesĂąadda aĂąaqeb adiran $ef imednas, ilmend n wayen ssexsaĂŽen.

7:166.t: Mi sme$wĂŽen iman nnsen $ef wayen i sen ipwakksen, Nenna yasen: "ilit d uddawen ucmiten"!

7:167.t: Mi IxebbeĂŽ Mass ik, ard asen d Iazen ara ten iĂąaqben, s Ă©Ă©uĂŽ, alamma d ass n tnekra. Mass ik, s tidep, Ip$awal ar uĂąaqeb. Neppa, s tidep, IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

7:168.t: NessemfaĂŽaq iten di tmurt, d leoyus, garasen wid imaĂąnen, garasen wid ur nemĂąin. NjeĂŽĂŽeb iten s ise$iyen akked tucmitin, amar a d u$alen s abrid.

7:169.t: NeĂ»fen ten, deffir sen, ineĂ»Ă»afen i iweĂŽten Tazmamt. Ppaddamen lerbaĂȘ n ddunit, qqaĂŽen: "ad a$ semmĂȘen". Ma rnan usan ten id lerbaĂȘ, am widen, a ten ddmen. Day ur Ăąahden ara s Tezmamt, ard tidep kan, ara inin $ef Ăebbi? U lemden i illan degs. Ppif axxam aneggaru, i wid ipĂȘezziben. Day ur tfehmem ara?

7:170.t: Wid iĂźĂźfen di Tezmamt, ipĂ©allan, s tidep, ur NveggiĂą arraz n lĂąuĂ»am.

7:171.t: Mi Nessuli adrar sennig sen, amzun d tili, $ilen, s tidep, ara d i$li fellasen. ĂĂźfet nezzeh ayen i wen Nefka, smektit ed ayen illan degs, amar a pĂȘezzbem.

7:172.t: Mi d Iddem Mass ik, si tgeĂ©Ă©al n tarwa n Adem, dderya nnsen, Inna yasen a d cehhden $ef yiman nnsen: "day ur Lli$ ara d Mass nnwen"? Nnan: "ih, ncehhed". Akka ur d teqqaĂŽem ara, ass n tnekra: "s tidep, ayagi d ayen ur neĂ©ĂŽi".

7:173.t: Ne$ a d tinim: "d imezwura nne$ kan i icurken, zik. Nekwni d tarwa deffir sen. Day a$ Ten$ev, ilmend n wayen xedmen wid iĂŽejjnen"?

7:174.t: Akka ay NfeĂ»Ă»el issekniyen, amar a d u$alen s abrid.

7:175.t: EĂȘku yasen d tadyant n win iwumi Nefka issekniyen nneÂŁ. Irra ten akin. Idda yides CciĂźan, iu$al seg wid i$eĂŽqen.

7:176.t: Lemmer i ÂŁ ihwi, Nessuli t yissen. Maca, ib$a tamurt, idda d lhawiyya s. Ihi, amedya s am win n waydi, ma teddiv p fellas, ad ilehhet, ma teooiv t, ad ilehhet. D wagi ay d amedya n ugdud i iskaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ. EĂȘku d tadyant, amar a d mmektin.

7:177.t: Agdud iskaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, d yir amedya. Pddennisen iman nnsen.

7:178.t: Win Inha Ăebbi, ihi, idda d ubrid. Wid Itlef Ăebbi, nitni d imexsuĂŽen.

7:179.t: Ni$ Neswejd ed, i Loahennama, aĂźas n leonun akked yimdanen. SĂąan ulawen, ur fehhmen yissen; sĂąan allen, ur pwalin yissent; sĂąan imeĂ©Ă©u$en, ur sellen yissen. Nitni am lmal, ne$ nnetlafen kteĂŽ. Wigi d i$wefliyen.

7:180.t: I Ăebbi, ismawen Ă»Ă»am. NaĂąĂŽet eP, yissen. VeĂŽĂŽfet seg wid issexsaĂŽen ismawen iS. Ad ppuqeĂźĂźin $ef wayen xeddmen.

7:181.t: Deg wayen Nexleq, yiwen n lois ivfeĂŽ tidep. IpĂȘuddu syis.

7:182.t: Wid iskaddben issekniyen nneÂŁ, a ten Nawi, cwiĂź, cwiĂź, ar wanda ur Ă©ĂŽin.

7:183.t: Ad asen Fke$ lmudda. Ih, ticeĂŽkep iW d tunĂ»iĂȘt.

7:184.t: Day ur d tepmeyyizem ara? Ur illi umeddakwel nnwen d aĂŽehbani. Neppa, d aneddaĂŽ kan ipbegginen.

7:185.t: Day ur walan ara tagelda n tmurt, igenwan, akked wayen Ixleq Ăebbi n cci? Ni$, ahat, iqeĂŽb ed lajel nnsen. Anwa awal, deffir wagi, ar amnen?

7:186.t: Win Itlef Ăebbi, ur IsĂąi nnahi. A ten Ioo ad hemlen di tjehli nnsen.

7:187.t: A k steqsayen $ef yimir, melmi ara d yili. Ini: "i t IĂ©ĂŽan siwa Mass iw. D Neppa kan a t id Isseknen, di lweqt is. Ad iaĂ©ay di tmurt akked igenwan. Ur kwen id ippawev siwa deqzalla". A k steqsayen amzun tesĂąiv asali fellas. Ini: "i t Issnen siwa ĂĂebbi", maca tegwti n yimdanen ur ssinen.

7:188.t: Ini: "ur ksibe$ i iman iw, aba$uĂŽ ne$ vveĂŽĂŽ, kkes ed ayen Irad Ăebbi. Lemmer ssine$ tabavnit, ad ĂŽwu$ lxiĂŽ, ur iyi ipnal ixmiĂŽ. Nek d aneddaĂŽ kan, u d abcir, i ugdud iumnen".

7:189.t: D Neppa ikwen id Ixelqen si yiwen n yiman. Iddem ed segs tameĂźĂźut is, ad izde$ yides. Mi insa yides, tebbwi tadist tafessast; telĂȘa yis. Mi d teĂ»beĂȘ Ă©Ă©ayet, naĂąĂŽen Ăebbi: "a Mass nne$! Ma Tefkiv a$ d aĂąeĂŽvi, war ccekk, a nili seg wid isnemmiren".

7:190.t: Mi sen d Ifka aĂąeĂŽdi, rran aS icriken s wayen i sen d Ifka. I aĂąlay Ăebbi, sennig wayen pcaraken!

11:108.t: Wanag isaĂądiyen, di Loennet, ad wekkĂŽen, dinna, ayen ara dumen tmurt akked igenwan, siwa ma ur Irad ara Mass ik. D tikci n war tilas.

12:11.t: Nnan: "a babat nne$, acu k iu$en, ur a$ tuminev ara, $ef Yusef. Nekwni, fellas, s tidep, d unĂ»iĂȘen.

12:18.t: Bbwin d tasedrit is, degs idamen n rrya. Inna: "xaĂźi! D iman nnwen i wen d iccacven lameĂŽ. Ilha Ă»Ă»beĂŽ. Anuju $eĂŽ Ăebbi, mgal ayen d teĂȘkam".

12:19.t: Usan d iminigen, uznen win id ippagwmen, issader ssvel is. Inna: "a lxiĂŽ, wagi d aqcic"! Ffren t, amzun d sselĂąa. Ăebbi IĂ©ĂŽa acu xeddmen.

12:21.t: Inna, i tmeĂźĂźut is, UmaĂ»ĂŽi i t iu$en: "eĂŽĂȘeb yis, amar ad a$ infaĂą, at nerr d mmit nne$". Akka ay NesseqĂąad Yusef di tmurt, iwakken ad as NesseĂȘfev asefru n temsal. Ăebbi d Amezwaru s lameĂŽ iS, maca tegwti n medden ur Ă©ĂŽin ara.

12:23.t: Teb$a t tin u$ur izde$. Terra tibbura, u tenna: "eyya keĂ§Ă§"! Inna: "ad iyi Ineooi Ăebbi! Ni$ bab iw iĂŽĂȘeb yissi. S tidep, ur rebĂȘen imednas".

12:24.t: S tidep, teb$a t, u neppa ib$a p, lemmer ur iwala ara atebbet n Mass is. Akka, iwakken a NessebĂąad fellas tuccva, lĂąaĂŽ. Neppa, s tidep, seg imdanen nneÂŁ izedganen.

12:25.t: Uzzlen ar tebburt, tcerreg as tasedrit is, si zdeffir. Mmugren, argaz is, ar tebburt. Tenna: "acu ay d aqeĂźĂźi n win iĂąabwlen ad iccmet tawacult ik, siwa lĂȘebs ne$ aĂąaqeb aqeĂŽĂȘan"?

12:26.t: Inna: "d neppat iyi ib$an". Icuhhed ed yiwen unagi si twacult is: "ma teqqeĂŽs tsedrit si zdat, tenna d tidep, u neppa d akeddab.

12:27.t: Ma teqqeĂŽs tsedrit si zdeffir, teskaddeb, u neppa seg at tidep".

12:28.t: Mi iwala teqqeĂŽs tsedrit si zdeffir, inna: "ayagi, war ccekk, si nncub nnkwent. Ih, nncub nnkwent d timeqwĂŽaĂȘanin.

12:29.t: A Yusef, ppu ayagi, u kem ssuter ssmaĂȘ ubekkav im. Kem, s tidep, teccvev".

12:30.t: La qqaĂŽent tlawin, di temdint: "tameĂźĂźut umdebbeĂŽ tĂȘemmel acrik is. Teshebl ip tayri. F akken nwala, appan, s tidep, di ttelfan n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ".

12:31.t: Mi tesla s nncub nnsent, tuzen $uĂŽsent, thegga yasent tanalt. I yal yiwet segsent, tefka tafrut. Tenna: "effe$ ed garasent". Mi t walant, isdehc itent, jerĂȘent ifassen nnsent, nnant: "ĂȘaca Ăebbi, wagi maĂ§Ă§i d amdan, wagi siwa d lmelk ukyis".

12:32.t: Tenna: "d wagi i$ef iyi tlummemt. Ih, b$i$ t, neppa iqqim zeddig. Ma ur ixdim ara ay s umĂŽe$, war ccekk, ad ipwaĂȘbes, ad ipwaĂȘqeĂŽ".

12:33.t: Inna: "a Mass iw! Smenyafe$ lĂȘebs i wayen u$ur iyi d ssawalent. Ma ur TesbaĂądev ara felli nncub nnsent, ad male$ $uĂŽsent, ad ili$ seg wid ur nessin".

12:35.t: Sinna, mi ten usan issekniyen, ufan, war ccekk, ilaq a t irr ar lĂȘebs, kra n tallit.

12:36.t: Kecmen yides, ar lĂȘebs, sin ilmeĂ©iyen. Inna yiwen degsen: "nek wala$ iman iw, la teĂ©Ă©me$ ccĂŽab". Inna d wayev: "nek wala$ iman iw, la ppawi$ a$ĂŽum $ef uqeĂŽĂŽu w, la teppen segs ifrax. Ssefru ya$ p id. Ih, nwala k seg iĂąaĂŽviyen".

12:37.t: Inna: "seg wayen iyi ss$eĂŽ Mass iw, ad awen p id ssefru$, uqbel a kwen id iawev lqut i wen ppakken. Nek ooi$ ddin n ugdud ur numin s Ăebbi, u nitni nekĂŽen laxeĂŽt.

12:38.t: Ddi$ d ddin n lejdud iw: IbĂŽahim, IsĂȘaq akked YaĂąqub. Ur a$ ippunefk a nezdukkel acemma i Ăebbi. Ayagi si lfevl n Ăebbi fellane$, akw $ef imdanen. Maca, tegwti n yimdanen ur snemmiren.

12:39.t: A yimeddukwal iw n lĂȘebs, menyif imawlan imfaĂŽaqen, ne$ Ăebbi Yiwen, AqehhaĂŽ?

12:40.t: Ay tĂąabdem, war Neppa, d ismawen kan i sen tefkam, kunwi akked imezwura nnwen. Ur asen d Issers ara Ăebbi kra udabu. LĂȘukm ar Ăebbi kan. IumeĂŽ ed ur tĂąabdem, siwa Neppa. D wagi ay d ddin uĂ»wib, maca tegwti n yimdanen ur ssinen.

12:41.t: A yimeddukwal iw n lĂȘebs, wanag yiwen degwen ad ismiri ccĂŽab, i bab is, wayev ad ippusemmeĂŽ $ef umidag, ifrax ad nneqben aqeĂŽĂŽu s. Ippuseyya lameĂŽ $ef wayen iyi d testeqsam".

12:42.t: Inna i win iĂȘĂ»a ad islek, segsen: "ar bab ik, smekti iyi d". CciĂźan iseppu t, ur t id ismekti ar bab is. Irna, di lĂȘebs, kra iseggwasen.

12:43.t: Inna ugellid: "nek wala$ Ă»a testan tiqebwaniyin, la tent teppent Ă»a tuvĂąifin, akked Ă»a tyedrin tizegzawin, tiyav d tiqquĂŽanin. A yimvebbĂŽen, ssefrut iyi d targit, ma tellam seg wid issefruyen tirga".

12:46.t: A Yusef, bab n tidep, ssefru ya$ d: Ă»a testan tiqebwaniyin, la tent teppent Ă»a tuvĂąifin, akked Ă»a tyedrin tizegzawin, tiyav d tiqquĂŽanin. Amar, ma u$ale$ ar imdanen, amar ad Ă©ĂŽen".

12:50.t: Inna ugellid: "awit ep id $uĂŽi". Mi t id iusa umersul, inna: "u$al ar bab ik, u steqsi t acu ay d l$eĂŽv n tlawin i ijerĂȘen ifassen nnsent. Mass iw, s tidep, Issen nncub nnsent".

12:77.t: Nnan: "ma iuker, ni$ iuker, zik, yiwen n watma s". Iffer ip Yusef $uĂŽes, ur asen p id inna ara. Inna: "aql akwen deg yir ĂȘala. Ăebbi Yif akw akken IĂ©ĂŽa ayen d teqqaĂŽem".

12:79.t: Inna: "ur a$ IĂąammed Ăebbi a neĂźĂźef, siwa win u$uĂŽ nufa ta$awsa nne$. Mulac, war ccekk, a nili d imednas".

12:80.t: Mi uysen segs, mcawaĂŽen, inna umeqwĂŽan segsen: "day ur teĂ©ĂŽim ara, ar babat wen tcubkem t s Ăebbi, u, zik, tveggĂąam Yusef? Ihi, ur pĂŽuĂȘu$ si tmurt a, d awez$i, alamma iserreĂȘ iyi baba, ne$ Ifra Ăebbi felli. Neppa, Yif akw imĂȘaddan.

12:81.t: U$alet ar babat wen, tinem as: a babat nne$, mmi k, s tidep, iuker. Ncehhed kan $ef wayen neĂ©ĂŽa, ur nessawev i tbavnit.

12:100.t: Issuli imawlan is ar usgeld. ÂŁlin, knan as. Inna: "a baba! D wagi ay d asefru n targit iw, n zik. Ni$ Issuffe$ ip Mass iw! Ni$ Iga yi leqĂŽaĂŽ mi yi d Issuffe$ si lĂȘebs. 12:101.t: A Mass iw, ni$ Tefkiv iyi si tgelda, TesĂȘefvev iyi asefru n temsal. Axellaq n tmurt akked igenwan, KeĂ§Ă§, d Bab iw di ddunit, di laxeĂŽt, Eddem ĂŽĂŽuĂȘ iw d amvua, Ssiwev iyi ar wid imaĂąnen".

12:102.t: Tagi, si teĂȘkayin n tbavnit, NweĂȘĂȘa yak p in. Ur telliv $uĂŽsen, mi mwafaqen a p andin.

12:109.t: Nuzen ed kan, uqbel ik, irgazen seg imezda$ n temdinin, iwumi NweĂȘĂȘa. Day ur unagen ara di tmurt, ad walin amek tevĂŽa d wid i ten id izwaren? Ih, pifxiĂŽ axxam aneggaru i wid ipĂȘezziben. Day ur tefhimem ara?

12:110.t: Alamma, mi uysen imazanen, u meyyzen ar skaddben ten, tusa ten id tallalt s$uĂŽneÂŁ. Nepsellik win i ÂŁ ihwan. Ur ipwakkas ara ssxev nneÂŁ, i ugdud ibe$wviyen.

13:1.t: AlmĂŽ. Wigi d issekniyen n Tezmamt. Ayen i k d irsen, s$uĂŽ Mass ik, d tidep, maca tegwti n medden ur ppamnen.

13:3.t: Neppa i IsswesĂąen tamurt. Irra degs idurar, isaffen. Irra tayuga di yal ppemĂŽa. Ip$ummu ass s yiv. Deg waya, s tidep, d issekniyen i ugdud ipxemmimen.

13:4.t: Di tmurt, tibĂȘirin tioiratin, leonanat n tĂ©uĂŽin, nnaĂąma, tizdayin, v$an ne$ ur v$in, cerken aman nnsen. Nesmenyaf kra i kra, i wuĂ§Ă§i. Deg waya, s tidep, d issekniyen i ugdud ifehmen.

13:5.t: Ma twehmev, issewham ay d qqaĂŽen: "ma nu$al d akal, day fella$, s tidep, lxelq amaynut"? D wigi i inekĂŽen Mass nnsen. Wigi, azaglu $ef tmegĂŽav. Wigi d at tmes, nitni, degs, ad wekkĂŽen.

13:6.t: SĂȘaren k ar tucmip, uqbel ise$. Ni$ vĂŽant am tigi, uqbel nnsen. Mass ik, s tidep, $uĂŽeS ssmaĂȘ i imdanen deg wayen ccven. Mass ik, s tidep, IwĂąaĂŽ deg uĂąaqeb.

13:7.t: La qqaĂŽen wid ijehlen: "a lemmer id irs $uĂŽes ussekni, s$uĂŽ Mass is". KeĂ§Ă§, d aneddaĂŽ kan. I yal agdud, win inehhun.

13:11.t: IsĂąa iĂąssasen zdat es, deffir es, pĂȘaraben fellas, s lameĂŽ n Ăebbi. Ăebbi, s tidep, ur Ipbeddil i illan deg ugdud, alamma bedlen i illan deg iman nnsen. Ma Irad Ăebbi ayen n dir, i ugdud, ur t itekkes yiwen. Ur sĂąin amĂąiwen, war Neppa.

13:13.t: TesbuccuĂą aS termegt, s ccekĂŽan, akken lmalayek, seg wakken ugadent eP. Ippazen ed ssiĂąqat, IpĂȘaz yisent win i S ihwan. Nitni pnamaren $ef Ăebbi. Neppa teqseĂȘ tezmert iS.

13:14.t: ÂŁuĂŽ Neppa, anuju n tidep. Wid u$uĂŽ la pnujun, war Neppa, ur asen d pparan s wacemma. Am win issendin ifassen i waman, ib$a ad awven s imi s, ur ibbwiv ar leb$i s. Anuju ijehliyen ar ttelfan kan.

13:16.t: Ini: "anwa ay d Mass n tmurt akked igenwan"? Ini: "d Ăebbi. Ihi day a pperrem d iĂȘbiben, war Neppa, wid ur nemlik, i yiman nnsen, aba$uĂŽ ne$ vveĂŽĂŽ"? Ini: "day iaĂądel uder$al akked win ipwalin? Ne$, day Ăąadlent tillas akked tafat? Ne$, rran imcurak i Ăebbi, i ixelqen am lxelq iS, ufan t ippemcabi"? Ini: "d Ăebbi i Ixelqen yal cci. D Neppa ay d Yiwen, d AqehhaĂŽ".

13:17.t: Isse$lay ed aman, seg igenni. Serrun deg $ezĂŽan, s leqdeĂŽ nnsen. AcercuĂŽ ippawi ikuftan ippifliwen. Ppemcabin ikuftan ar wayen fessin di tmes, iwakken ad Ă»enĂąen ĂŽĂŽĂȘuĂȘ ne$ dduzan. Akka ay d Isskan Ăebbi tidep akked tkerkas. Ihi ikuftan ad ppuveggĂŽen, ma d wayen inefĂąen medden, a d igwri di tmurt. Akka ay d Ippak Ăebbi imedyaten.

13:22.t: Wid iĂ»ebĂŽen, ssaramen udem n Mass nnsen, bedden i tĂ©allit, pseddiqen seg wayen is iten N$at, s tuffra u ĂąinĂąni, swexxiĂŽen tucmip s yise$. I nitni, agwav s Axxam.

13:25.t: Wid ipĂŽuĂ©un laĂąqed n Ăebbi, deffir lemwafaqa s, wid igezmen ayen d IumeĂŽ Ăebbi ad imlil, u ssefsaden di tmurt, wigi, i nitni xezzu, i nitni yir axxam.

13:26.t: Ăebbi Issugut ĂŽĂŽeĂ©q i win i S ihwan, u Iwezzen. TaĂąoeb iten tmeddurt n ddunit. Tameddurt n ddunit, d urar kan, zdat laxeĂŽt.

13:27.t: La qqaĂŽen wid ijehlen: "a lemmer id iris, $uĂŽes, ussekni s$uĂŽ Mass is"! Ini: "Ăebbi, s tidep, Itellif win i S ihwan. Inehhu $uĂŽeS, wid isteĂŽoiĂąen,

13:28.t: wid iumnen, iwumi itheddin wul, mara d mmektin Ăebbi". Ni$, s usmekti n Ăebbi, pheddinen wulawen.

16:111.t: Ass ideg ara d ias, yal yiwen, ad inamer $ef yiman is, u yal yiwen ad iĂźĂźukafi $ef wayen ixdem, nitni ur pwadensen.

16:112.t: Ifka d Ăebbi amedya n temdint, i illan di laman u ĂźĂźmana. Ippas ip id ĂŽĂŽeĂ©q is, s lufa, si yal tama. TenkeĂŽ l$it n Ăebbi. Isukk Ăebbi fellas tawa$it n llaĂ© akked lweĂȘc, ilmend n wayen la Ă»Ă»enĂąan.

16:113.t: Ni$ iusa ten id umazan, segsen. Skaddben t, iwwet iten uĂąaqeb, nitni densen.

16:114.t: EĂ§Ă§et seg wayen is ikwen I$at Ăebbi, i iĂȘellen, i imaĂąnen. Snemmret l$it n Ăebbi, ma d Neppa ay tĂąabdem.

16:115.t: I yawen Igdel siwa loifa, idim, aksum n yilef, akked wayen id irsen s yisem ur nelli d win n Ăebbi. Ma d win terra tmara, ur ijuĂŽ, ur inufeq, Ăebbi, s tidep, IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

16:116.t: Ur qqaĂŽet tikerkas id ppawin ilsawen nnwen: "aya d leĂȘlal, aya d leĂȘĂŽam". A d tegrem tikerkas $ef Ăebbi. Wid id iggaren tikerkas $ef Ăebbi, ur rebĂȘen.

16:117.t: Drus ara zhun, fellasen aĂąaqeb aqeĂŽĂȘan.

16:118.t: I wudayen, Negdel ayen i$ef i k NeĂȘka, iu$ lĂȘal. Ur ten Nednis, maca nitni ddennisen iman nnsen.

16:119.t: Sinna, Mass ik, i wid ixedmen cceĂŽĂŽ, ur ssinen, d$a steĂŽoĂąen deffir waya, u sweqmen, Mass ik, war ccekk, deffir waya, IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

16:120.t: IbĂŽahim, ih, d amdan i imalen ar tidep, i iunzen i Ăebbi. Ur illi seg imcurak.

16:121.t: Isnemmar l$it iS. Ifren it u Inha t s abrid uwqim.

16:122.t: Nefka yas di ddunit ise$, u, di laxeĂŽt, neppa, s tidep, ad yili seg izedganen.

16:123.t: Sinna, NweĂȘĂȘa yak d a ppedduv d ddin n IbĂŽahim, i imalen ar tidep. Ur illi seg imcurak.

16:124.t: Ssebt, iu$al kan i wid imgarraden fellas. Ih, Mass ik ad IĂȘudd garasen, ass n tnekra, $ef wayen llan mgarraden.

16:125.t: Enced s abrid n Mass ik, s Ă»Ă»wab akked nnhaya tumĂąint. Mmeslay iten, s yiles aĂ©idan mavi. Ih, Mass ik Yif akw akken Issen, anwi i iff$en seg ubrid iS. Neppa Yif akw akken Issen, anwi i ipwanhan.

16:126.t: Ma tĂąaqbem, Ăąaqbet akken teppuĂąaqbem. Ma tĂ»ebĂŽem, yif it i iĂ»ebĂŽiyen.

16:127.t: EĂ»beĂŽ. ĂĂ»ebĂŽ ik s Ăebbi kan. Ur $webben ilmend nnsen, ur pveyyiq si tcengal nnsen.

16:128.t: Ih, Ăebbi Atan ar wid ipĂȘezziben, akked wid issewqamen.

17:1.t: Gedha s Win Ibbwin amdan iS, d iminig n yiv, si LoamaĂą n LĂȘaĂŽam, ar LoamaĂą ibaĂąden mavi, ideg NeĂŽqa i as d izzin, iwakken ad as Nessken, seg issekniyen nneÂŁ. Ih, Neppa, d Win Isellen, Ipwalin.

17:2.t: Nefka Tazmamt i Musa, u Nerra p d nnhaya i At IsĂŽail. "Ur sĂąut awkil, war Nek".

17:3.t: D tarwa n wid i Nebbwi akked NuĂȘ. Neppa, s tidep, d amdan isnemmiren.

17:4.t: Nsseyya di Tezmamt, i At IsĂŽail: "war ccekk, a ppesfesdem, di tmurt, berdayen, u aĂźas ara tesme$wĂŽem iman nnwen".

17:5.t: Mi d iusa usefsed amenzu segsen, Nuzen awen d imdanen nneÂŁ, s loehd uqsiĂȘ, kecmen ixxamen; lemĂąahda tevĂŽa.

17:6.t: Sinna, Nerra d ppaĂŽ nnwen, segsen. Nebbwi yawen d ayla, tarwa. NesĂźuqqet iĂąsekĂŽiwen nnwen.

17:7.t: Ma tmaĂąnem, i iman nnwen, ma tdensem, i iman nnwen. Mi d tusa lemĂąahda taneggarut, ssexven udmawen nnwen, kecmen LoamaĂą, akken i t kecmen abrid amenzu; hudden, wakali, ayen is ipzuxxun.

17:8.t: Ahat Mass nnwen ad IĂȘun fellawen. Ma tulsem, a Nales. Nerra Loahennama d lĂȘebs i ijehliyen.

17:9.t: Ih, LeqwĂŽan agi inehhu ar wayen iweqmen mavi, ibecceĂŽ lmumnin i ixeddmen ayen ilhan, ar i nitni akafi meqqwĂŽen.

17:10.t: Wanag wid ur numin ara s laxeĂŽt, Nhegga yasen d aĂąaqeb aqeĂŽĂȘan.

17:11.t: Amdan issawal i cceĂŽĂŽ, akken issawal i lxiĂŽ. Amdan izga d aĂȘemmaq.

17:12.t: Nerra, iv akked wass, d sin issekniyen. Assekni n yiv Nerra d tellis, Nerra win n wass d win ipwalin, iwakken a pnadim lfevl n Mass nnwen, a ppissinem amvan iseggwasen, akked leĂȘsab. Yal ta$awsa, NfeĂ»Ă»el ip akken iwata.

17:13.t: I yal amdan, Ncudd as lbext is s amgarv is. Ass n tnekra, ad as d Nessuffe$ tazmamt ara iaf teldi.

17:14.t: "ÂŁeĂŽ tazmamt ik! Tqaddev, assa, s yiman ik, i uqeĂźĂźi k".

17:15.t: Win ipwanhan, i iman is kan, win innetlafen, innetlaf mgal iman is kan. Ur ipbibbi yiwen taĂąkkwemt n wayev. Ur Nekkat, alamma Nuzen amazan.

17:16.t: Ma Neb$a a Nesqucc tamdint, Neppak lameĂŽ i isĂąiyen is, ad xedmen, degs, cceĂŽĂŽ. Ad iĂąaddi fellas Wawal, a p Nhudd wakali.

17:17.t: AcĂȘal n tsuta ay Nesqucc, deffir NuĂȘ! Ad Iqadd Mass ik, i tussna akked tmeĂ©ĂŽiwt ibekkaven n imdanen iS.

17:18.t: Win ib$an taĂȘemmaqt, Nezzazzal as degs, i ÂŁ ihwan, i win i ÂŁ Neb$a. Sinna, Nerra yas Loahennama ad din iĂŽ$, indell, ippuveggeĂŽ.

17:19.t: Win ib$an laxeĂŽt, iaĂązem fellas yal laĂązem, u neppa iumen; widak, tajmilt i laĂązem nnsen.

17:20.t: I akw, i wigi d wiyav, NwessaĂą tikci s$uĂŽ Mass ik. Tikci n Mass ik, ur meĂȘdudet.

17:21.t: Wali amek Nesmenyaf kra i wiyav. War ccekk, di laxeĂŽt, lfeĂŽq d usmenyef, ad ilin sennig waya.

17:22.t: Ur sĂąu, ar tama n Ăebbi, ĂŽebbi nniven, mulac a ppu$alev d imdelli, d imveggaĂą.

17:23.t: Iseyya d Mass ik: ur tĂąabdem siwa Neppa, elhut ar imawlan. Ma, $uĂŽek wesser yiwen, ne$ ma wessren i sin, ur asen qqaĂŽ: "ttfuh"! Ur ten ppara. Mmeslay asen s lkyasa.

17:24.t: Zger fellasen tacvat n lmaĂȘnana. Ini: "a Mass iw! Ăun fellasen, akken iyi d ssekren d amejtuĂȘ".

17:25.t: Mass nnwen Yif akw akken Issen, i illan deg iman nnwen. Ma telham, Neppa, s tidep, IpsemmiĂȘ wid isteĂŽoiĂąen.

17:26.t: Efk i llezm ik amur is, akw i ume$bun akked win d ibbwi ubrid. Ur pjeggiĂȘ d ajeggeĂȘ.

17:27.t: IjeggaĂȘen, s tidep, d atmaten n CciĂźan. CciĂźan ijhel ar Mass is.

17:28.t: Ma tfuĂŽqev ten, tĂŽe$bev u tegguniv aĂȘunu s$uĂŽ Mass ik, ini yasen awal aĂ©idan.

17:29.t: Ur pcuddu afus ik ar yiri k, ur as berru aĂźas, mulac a ppu$alev d ambaĂ»i, d ame$bun.

17:30.t: S tidep, Mass ik I$ennu win i S ihwan, u Iwezzen. Neppa, s tidep, Ipwali, Issen imdanen iS.

17:31.t: Ur Neqqet arraw nnwen, ma tugadem tiggulelt. D Nekwni ara ten IĂŽezqen, kunwi yidsen. Ih, timen$iwt nnsen d tucmip meqqwĂŽen.

17:32.t: Ur zennut, d ayen n dir, d abrid ucmit.

17:33.t: Ur neqqet amdan i wen Igdel Ăebbi, siwa ma di tidep. Win ipwan$an s le$deĂŽ, ihi, a Nefk adabu i walag is. Ur ipjuĂŽĂŽu di tmen$iwt, ihi, neppa, ad ippusellek.

17:34.t: Ur pnalet ayla ugujil, siwa ar wayen imaĂąnen, ar d immeĂȘtel. QadĂŽet lemĂąahda; ih, lemĂąahda s usteqsi.

17:35.t: QadĂŽet lkil ma tektalem, weznet s lmizan imaĂąnen. Yif it wakka, a ppelhu taggara.

17:36.t: Ur ĂźĂźafaĂŽ ayen ur tessinev. Timejjin, iĂ©ĂŽi, ul, s tidep, ad ppuseqsin akw.

17:37.t: Ur teddu di tmurt, d amzuxxi. Ih, keĂ§Ă§ ur tezmirev, d awez$i, a pneqĂŽev tamurt, ne$ a ppessiwvev laĂąli idurar.

17:38.t: Adiran, deg waya akw, Ikerh it Mass ik.

17:39.t: Ayagi, seg wayen i k IweĂȘĂȘa Mass ik, n Ă»Ă»wab. Ur ppara, ar tama n Ăebbi, ĂŽebbi nniven, mulac a ppepwaveggĂŽev ar Loahennama d ambaĂ»i, d amnafeq.

17:40.t: Day wen d Ifren Mass nnwen arrac, u Iddem, i iman iS, tullas, si lmalayek? S tidep, kunwi tegrem d awal anecilat.

17:41.t: Ih, ay d Nebbwi di LeqwĂŽan agi, iwakken a d mmektin. I yasen d irna, siwa a$unfu.

17:42.t: Ini: "lemmer llin yides iĂŽebbiten, akken la d qqaĂŽen, yili ad nadin abrid ara ten iawin ar n Bab n usgeld".

17:43.t: Gedha s yiS, aĂźas i AĂąlay sennig wayen d qqaĂŽen!

17:44.t: Ppanzen aS igenwan di Ă»a, tamurt, u wayen illan degsen. Ur illi wayen ur aS neppanez, ur T NesbuccuĂą s ccekĂŽan. Maca, ur tfehmem ara annuz nnsen. Ih, Neppa IĂȘellem, IpsemmiĂȘ.

17:45.t: Mara teqqaĂŽev LeqwĂŽan, Neppara, garak d wid ur numin ara s laxeĂŽt, aĂȘurrim abavni.

17:46.t: Nerra $ef ulawen nnsen ssteĂŽ, iwakken ur t fehmen; di tmejjin nnsen, tiĂąĂ©egt. Ma tesmektiv d, di LeqwĂŽan, Mass ik d Yiwen, ad zzin akin, s u$unfu.

17:47.t: Nekwni, Nif akw akken NeĂ©ĂŽa, acu iwumi sellen, mara k ssemĂȘasen, mara hedĂŽen, mi qqaĂŽen imednas: "la teppeddum kan d urgaz iwumi sseĂȘren".

17:48.t: Wali amek i k d bbwin imedyaten. Nnetlafen. Ur zmiren ad afen abrid.

17:49.t: Nnan: "day mi nu$al d i$san, d a$webbaĂŽ, d Ă»Ă»eĂȘ a d nu$al di lxelq amaynut"?

17:50.t: Ini: "ilit d azĂŽu ne$ d uzzal,

17:51.t: ne$ d lxelq id iusan deg idmaren nnwen". A d inin: "anwa ara a $ d irren"? Ini: "d Win ikwen id Ixelqen, abrid amenzu". Ad huzen iqweĂŽĂŽa nnsen $uĂŽek, ad inin: "melmi ayagi"? Ini: "izmer ad yili iqeĂŽb ed".

17:52.t: Ass ideg ara awen d Isiwel, a d tjawbem s ccekĂŽan iS, a p$ilem cwiĂź kan ay teqqimem.

17:53.t: Ini i imdanen iw ad inin awal ifuqen. CciĂźan, s tidep, isskar ameĂŽĂ©i garasen. Ih, CciĂźan d acengu n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ i umdan.

17:54.t: Mass nnwen Yif akw akken ikwen Issen. Ad IĂȘun fellawen, ma Ib$a; a kwen IĂąaqeb ma Ib$a. Ur k id Nuzen ara d awkil nnsen.

17:55.t: Mass ik Yif akw akken IĂ©ĂŽa i illan di tmurt akked igenwan. Ni$ Nesmenyaf kra n lambiyya i wiyav. I Dawed Nefka Ihellilen.

17:56.t: Ini: "nujet $eĂŽ wid tepkabarem, war Neppa. Ur zmiren ad awen kksen ccqa, ne$ a t bedlen.

17:57.t: Wigi u$uĂŽ la pnujun, la pqelliben ppawil ara ten isqeĂŽben nezzeh ar Mass nnsen. Ssaramen aĂȘunu S, ppagwaden aĂąaqeb iS". Ih, aĂąaqeb n Mass ik, issagwad.

17:58.t: Ur telli temdint ur Nesquccu, uqbel ass n tnekra, ne$ ur NĂąaqeb s leqseĂȘ. Ayagi iura di Tezmamt.

17:59.t: I ÂŁ iĂźĂźfen $ef uceggaĂą issekniyen, d nnkeĂŽ nnsen, kan, s$uĂŽ imezwura. Nuzen ed tal$wemt i Tamud, d ayen pwalin. Densen p. Ur d Neppazen issekniyen siwa i ussigwed.

17:60.t: Mi k Nenna: "Mass ik, s tidep, Izzi i imdanen". Ma dayen i k Nerra teĂ©ĂŽiv t, d ahewwel kan i medden. Akken ttejĂŽa tamenĂąult di LeqwĂŽan. Nessagwad iten. Ay sen d irennu siwa nnfaq ameqwĂŽan.

17:61.t: Mi Nenna i lmalayek: "knumt i Adem", knant, siwa Iblis. Inna: "day ad knu$ i win Txelqev s talaxt"?

17:62.t: Inna: "Twalav wagi i TĂąuzzev sennig iw, lemmer a yi Teooev, ar ass n tnekra, war ccekk, ad $wu$ tarwa s, siwa ixeĂźĂźayen".

17:63.t: Inna: "ĂuĂȘ! Wid, segsen, i iddan yidek, ihi, aqeĂźĂźi nnwen d Loahennama, d aqeĂźĂźi meqqwĂŽen.

17:64.t: LaĂąaj win iwumi tzemĂŽev, degsen, s ta$wect ik. ÂŁewwes fellasen s imnayen ik, d iterrasen ik. Ecrek yidsen ayla, tarwa. Ăahed asen". I yasen iĂąahed CciĂźan, siwa a$uĂŽĂŽu.

17:65.t: " Ma d imdanen iW, ur tesĂąiv adabu fellasen". Mass ik Iqadd d Awkil.

17:66.t: Mass nnwen, i wen IsselĂȘayen lbabuĂŽ di yill, a pnadim lfevl iS. Ih, Neppa IpĂȘunu fellawen.

17:67.t: Ma tevĂŽa yidwen lmuĂ»iba di yill, ayen u$uĂŽ tepnujum, war Neppa, ittellif. Mi kwen Isellek ar lberr, twexxĂŽem. Amdan izga d lkaraĂą.

17:68.t: Day t$ilem ur Ipseggix ara tamurt yiswen, ne$ ur awen d Ippazen ara tabucivant, d$a ur teppafem awkil?

17:69.t: Ne$ day t$ilem ur kwen id Ippara ara tikelt nniven, ad awen d Iazen aĂ»eĂŽĂ»aĂŽ, a kwen I$mes ilmend n tijehli nnwen, sinna ur teppafem, mgal aÂŁ, amalal?

17:70.t: Ni$ Nkeyyes tarwa n Adem. Nebbwi ten di lberr, di yill, N$at iten s wayen ilhan, Nesmenyaf iten, nezzeh, i waĂźas seg wid i Nexleq.

17:71.t: Ass ideg ara Nenced akw imdanen, s imvebĂŽen nnsen; win id tusa tezmamt is yeffus is, widak ad $ĂŽen tazmamt nnsen, ur pwadensen s tissegnit;

17:72.t: win illan d ader$al di tagi, ad yili d ader$al di laxeĂŽt, ad izid di tuff$a n ubrid.

17:73.t: S tidep, qĂŽib i k hewwlen $ef wayen i k d NweĂȘĂȘa, a d tesnulfuv ayen nniven, mgal aÂŁ. D$a, a k rren d aĂȘbib.

17:74.t: Lemmer ur k Ntebbet ara, qĂŽib tmalev cwiĂź $uĂŽsen.

17:75.t: Yili ad ak NesĂąaddi tudert akked tmeppant, berdayen, sinna, ur teppafev, mgal aÂŁ, w ara k isellken.

17:76.t: Ih, qĂŽib i k id srewlen si tmurt, a k id ssuff$en segs. Yili cwiĂź kan ara d gwrin, deffir ek.

17:77.t: D tannumi imazanen nneÂŁ, id Nuzen, uqbel ik. Ur teppafev ara abeddel, di lĂąadda nneÂŁ.

17:78.t: Bedd i tĂ©allit mi istu$la yiĂźij, alamma d tellis n yiv. LeqwĂŽan, tafrara. Ih, LeqwĂŽan, tafrara, isĂąa inagan.

17:79.t: AĂąwez yis kra n yiv, d nnafila k, amar a k id Irr Mass ik, deg umkan i pcekkiĂŽen.

17:80.t: Ini: "a Mass iw! Ssekcem iyi, anekcum n tidep. Ssuffe$ iyi, tuff$a n tidep. Efk iyi, s$uĂŽeK, adabu ipselliken".

17:81.t: Ini: "tusa d tidep, $abent tkerkas. Ih, tikerkas ilaq ad $abent".

17:82.t: Nesrusu d, si LeqwĂŽan, ayen illan d ĂȘellu akked uĂȘunu i lmumnin. I irennu, i imednas, siwa lexsaĂŽa.

17:83.t: Ma N$at amdan ad iwexxeĂŽ, ad iveĂŽĂŽef iman is. Ma iĂȘuza t wugur ad iayes.

17:84.t: Ini: "yal yiwen ixeddem akken ipwali. Mass nnwen Yif akw akken i Issen anwa i ipwanhan kteĂŽ".

17:85.t: Steqsan k id $ef ĂŽĂŽuĂȘ. Ini: "ĂŽĂŽuĂȘ si lameĂŽ n Mass iw. Drus kan n tmusni i wen ippunefken".

17:86.t: Ma ihwa yaÂŁ, a Nekkes ayen i k NweĂȘĂȘa. D$a ur teppafev, mgal aÂŁ, awkil,

17:87.t: siwa aĂȘunu s$uĂŽ Mass ik. Ih, lfevl iS, i keĂ§Ă§, izga meqqweĂŽ.

17:88.t: Ini: "lemmer ad mlilen imdanen akked leonun, iwakken a d awin am LeqwĂŽan agi, ur d ppawin i t icban, xas mĂąawanen".

17:89.t: Ni$ Nefka d i imdanen, di LeqwĂŽan agi, si yal imedyaten. Tegwti n yimdanen ur b$in, siwa tijehli.

17:90.t: Nnan: "ur k neppamen alamma tesfeggvev a$ d a$balu, si tmurt;

17:91.t: ne$, tesĂąiv leonan n tezdayin akked tfeĂŽĂŽant, ideg feggven isaffen;

17:92.t: ne$, a d tesse$liv igenni d ifeĂ»lan, akken i $ tzuxxev; ne$, a d tasev s Ăebbi akked lmalayek, zdat nne$;

17:93.t: Ne$ a ppesĂąuv axxam imzewweq, ne$ a ppaliv s igenni. Ur neppamen, s walluy ik, alamma tessersev ane$ d tazmamt ara n$eĂŽ". Ini: "gedha s Mass iw! Day lli$ d ayen nniven, siwa d amdan amazan"?

17:94.t: I iĂźĂźfen imdanen ur uminen, mi ten id tusa nnhaya, mara d inin kan: "Iuzen ed Ăebbi amdan d amazan".

17:95.t: Ini: "lemmer llint, di tmurt, lmalayek, teddunt di laman, yili Nessers asent ed, seg igenni, lmelk amazan".

17:96.t: Ini: "Iqadd Mass iw d Anagi, gari yidwen. Neppa, s tidep, Ipwali imdanen iS, Issen iten".

17:97.t: Win Inha Ăebbi, atan idda d ubrid. Wid Itlef, ur asen teppafev imawlan, war Neppa, d awez$i. A ten id Nefser ass n tnekra $ef udmawen nnsen, dre$len, gugmen, ĂąaĂ©gen. Axxam nnsen d Loahennama. Mi tenqes tmes, ad asen Nernu ajajiĂȘ.

17:98.t: D wagi ay d aqeĂźĂźi nnsen, imi nekĂŽen issekniyen nneÂŁ, u nnan: "day mi nu$al d i$san, d a$webbaĂŽ, a d nu$al di lxelq amaynut"?

17:99.t: Ne$, day ur walan ara ar Ăebbi i Ixelqen tamurt akked igenwan, Izmer a d Ixleq i ten icban? Irra yasen lajel, ur degs ccekk. Ur b$in imednas, siwa tijehli.

17:100.t: Ini: "lemmer tesĂąim igerrujen uĂȘunu n Mass iw, ur ten tepnalem, a ppagwadem a ten tĂ»eĂŽĂŽfem. Amdan izga d imceĂȘĂȘi".

17:101.t: Ni$ Nefka, i Musa, tza issekniyen iberrzen. Steqsi At IsĂŽail. Mi d iusa $uĂŽsen, inna yas FerĂąun: "a Musa! Nek, wala$, war ccekk, seĂȘĂȘern ak".

17:102.t: Inna: "ni$ teĂ©ĂŽiv ur d issers yiwen wigi, d tiftilin, siwa Mass n tmurt akked igenwan. Nek, wala$, a FerĂąun, war ccekk, tĂźeĂȘĂȘnev".

17:103.t: Ib$a a ten iĂ©Ă©aĂą si tmurt, N$emmeq it, akked wid iddan yides, meĂŽĂŽa.

17:104.t: Deffir es, Nenna i At IsĂŽail: "zed$et tamurt. Mi d tusa lemĂąahda n laxeĂŽt, a kwen id Nawi, d Ăźayfat".

17:105.t: Nessers it id s tidep. S tidep, ay d irs. Nuzen ik id, kan, i ubecceĂŽ d uneddeĂŽ.

17:106.t: LeqwĂŽan NfeĂŽq it, iwakken a t temlev i medden, s laĂąqel. Nessader it id, s l$eĂŽv.

17:107.t: Ini: "amnet yis, ne$ qqimet". Ih, ma mlan t i wid tebbwev tussna, uqbel is, ad $lin $ef udmawen, knan.

17:108.t: Ad inin: "gedha s Mass nne$! TĂ»aĂŽ lemĂąahda n Mass nne$".

17:109.t: Ad $lin $ef udmawen s imeĂźĂźawen. Ad innerni wannuz nnsen.

17:110.t: Ini: "nujet $er Ăebbi, ne$ nujet $er UĂȘnin. Akken tnujem, ineS ismawen imaĂąnen yifen akw wiyav". Di tĂ©allit ik, ur saĂąlay Ă»Ă»ut ik, ur t ssrusu. Ad isker kan.

17:111.t: Ini: "ccekĂŽan i Ăebbi, ur NesĂąi aqcic, ur NesĂąi acrik di tgelda, ur NesĂąi bab mgal asdullu". Ssem$weĂŽ iT yal tem$weĂŽ.

18:1.t: CcekĂŽan i Ăebbi, id Issersen Tazmamt, i uxdim iS. AĂąwaj, degs, ur Irri.

18:2.t: Tewqem, iwakken a ppĂąaggen $ef ssxev uwĂąiĂŽ, s$uĂŽeS; u a pbecceĂŽ lmumnin ixeddmen ayen ilhan, ar nnsen warraz igerzen.

18:4.t: A ppĂąaggen i wid innan: "Ăebbi IsĂąa mmi S".

18:5.t: Ur illi wayen ssnen fellas; akken, imezwura nnsen. D awal uqbiĂȘ id iff$en seg imawen nnsen. D tikerkas kan ay ssawalen.

18:6.t: Ahat a phelkev iman ik, ar loiha nnsen, a p$weblev, imi ur uminen ara s usali agi?

18:7.t: Ni$ Nerra i illan di tmurt, d ccbaĂȘa ines, iwakken a NĂ©eĂŽ menyif iten, ar igiten ilhan.

18:8.t: A Nu$al a Nerr, i illan degs, d akal ibuĂŽen.

18:9.t: Ne$ t$ilev d At yifri kan, akked Ăaqim, ay d lwehma, ger issekniyen nneÂŁ?

18:10.t: Mi ssĂŽen iman nnsen ilmeĂ©iyen deg ifri, nnan: "a Mass nne$! Efk ane$ d aĂȘunu s$uĂŽeK; Err a$ lameĂŽ nne$ d uĂ»wib".

18:11.t: Deg ifri, Nesle$ imeĂ©Ă©u$en nnsen, acĂȘal iseggwasen.

18:12.t: Sinna, Nessker iten id, a NĂ©eĂŽ anta, ger snat n trebbuyaĂą, i iĂȘesben acĂȘal qqimen.

18:13.t: Nekwni, ad ak NeĂȘku, s tidep, taqsiĂź nnsen. Nitni, ih, d ilmeĂ©iyen, umnen s Mass nnsen. Nerna yasen nnhaya.

18:14.t: Nesseohed ulawen nnsen, mi kren nnan: "Mass nne$ d Mass n tmurt akked igenwan. Ur nepnuju, d awez$i, ar ĂŽebbi, war Neppa, mulac a d nini awal dduni.

18:15.t: Widak d agdud nne$. Ăabden iĂŽebbiten, war Neppa. Ay$eĂŽ ur a$ d bbwin, fellasen, adabu n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ? Anwa i idensen sennig win id igren tikerkas $ef Ăebbi?

18:16.t: Mi ten tfuĂŽqem, nitni akked wayen Ăąabden war Ăebbi, essĂŽet iman nwen deg ifri. Ad awen IzraĂą, Mass nnwen, seg uĂȘunu S. Ad awen Iheggi amwanes i lameĂŽ nnwen".

18:17.t: A pwaliv iĂźij, mi d inqeĂŽ, iwexxeĂŽ i ifri nnsen, ar yeffus. Mi i$li, ad asen iĂąaddi $eĂŽ zelmev. Nitni, din, di littsaĂą. Ayagi seg issekniyen n Ăebbi. Win Inha Ăebbi, neppa ipwanha; win Itlef, ur isĂąi, d awez$i, bab ara t inhun.

18:18.t: Ad as tiniv ukin, nitni ĂźĂźsen. Ntezzi ten yeffus, zelmev. Aydi nnsen, $ef umnaĂŽ, iĂ©Ă©el ivaĂŽen is. Lemmer a ten twaliv, ad asen trewlev, si tugdi; a k terkeb, segsen, lefqaĂą.

18:19.t: Akka ay ten id Nessenker, iwakken ad mesteqsin. Inna yiwen segsen: "acĂȘal n lweqt ay tesĂąaddam"? Nnan d: "nesĂąadda ass ne$ ur ibbwiv wass". Nnan: "Mass nnwen Yif akw akken IzĂŽa ay tesĂąaddam. Aznet ar temdint, yiwen segwen, s idrimen agi nnwen. Ad iwali anwa lqut iĂ»fan mavi, ad awen d iawi ĂŽĂŽeĂ©q, segs. Ad iĂȘader iman is, iwakken ur awen ipfaq yiwen.

18:20.t: Nitni, war ccekk, ma Ă©ĂŽan kwen, a kwen ĂŽeomen, ne$ a kwen rren ar ddin nnsen, d$a ur trebĂȘen, d awez$i".

18:21.t: Akka ay sen ten Nessken, iwakken ad Ă©ĂŽen ar lemĂąahda n Ăebbi d tidep; u, $ef yimir, ur illi ccekk. Mi mqellaĂąn $ef lameĂŽ nnsen, nnan: "bnut axxam sennig sen. Mass nnsen Yif akw akken iten Issen". Nnan wid iwumi iĂąadda wawal, $ef lameĂŽ nnsen: "a nerr, ihi, lemqam sennig sen".

18:22.t: Ad inin: "di krav yidsen, aydi nnsen d wis kuĂ©"; u ad inin: "di semus yidsen, aydi nnsen d wis sdis", pqelliben tabavnit. U ad inin: "di Ă»a yidsen, aydi nnsen d wis Ăźam". Ini: "Mass iw Yif akw akken IĂ©ĂŽa amvan nnsen. Drus kan i t iĂ©ĂŽan". Ur pnamar fellasen, siwa $ef wayen id ivehĂŽen. Ur ppesteqsay yiwen fellasen.

18:23.t: Ur qqaĂŽ ta$awsa a p xedme$, s tidep, azekka,

18:24.t: siwa ma Irad Ăebbi. Mmekti d Mass ik, ma teppuv. Ini: "amar ad iyi Inhu Mass iw, ar wayen yifen ayagi di Ă»Ă»wab".

18:25.t: SĂąaddan, deg ifri nnsen, krav twinas iseggwasen, rnan tza nniven.

18:26.t: Ini: "Ăebbi Yif akw akken IĂ©ĂŽa, acĂȘal sĂąaddan. IneS tabavnit n tmurt akked igenwan. Amek Neppa Ipwali, Isell! Ur sĂąin bab, war Neppa. Ur Izdukkul yiwen i useyyi S".

18:27.t: Mel ayen ik ed ippuweĂȘĂȘan, si Tezmamt n Mass ik. Ur illi ubeddel deg wawal iS. Ur teppafev ssĂŽan, war Neppa, d awez$i.

18:28.t: ĂebbeĂŽ iman ik, akked wid ipnujun ar Mass nnsen, taĂ»ebĂȘit, tameddit, pnadin udem iS. Ur ten tekkes si ger wallen ik, a pvemĂąav lefnun n tmeddurt n ddunit. Ur ssemĂȘas i win iwumi Nesse$fel ul is, ar usmekti nneÂŁ, i iddan d lhawiyya s, iwumi iffuhri lameĂŽ.

18:29.t: Ini: "tidep s$uĂŽ Mass nnwen. Ad iamen win ib$an, ad ijhel win ib$an". Ih, Nhegga d times, i imednas; ad asen zzin iĂȘeoouoa s. Ma ppren d, ad asen ppunefken waman am uzzal ifsin. Ad cwin wudmawen nnsen. A tissit tamcumt, a tanezdu$t tucmip!

18:30.t: Ih, wid iumnen, ixeddmen ayen ilhan, s tidep, ur NveggiĂą akafi n win ixedmen ayen ilhan.

18:31.t: I wigi, leonanat n Ăaden, ddaw sen isaffen ppazzalen. Ad qqnen, dinna, imeqyasen n ddheb, ad lsen iceĂźĂźiven izegzawen n leĂȘrir, ĂȘewcen s ddheb. Ad Ă©len, degs, $ef imĂźeĂŽĂȘen izewwqen. A lebsa lĂąali, a tanezdu$t tumĂąint!

18:32.t: Awi yasen d amedya n sin irgazen. I yiwen, Nefka snat tebĂȘirin n tĂ©uĂŽin, Nezzi yasent tizdayin, Nerra iger garasent.

18:33.t: Yal tibĂȘirt teppak ed l$ella s, ur ipxuĂ»Ă»u, segs, wacemma. Nesfeggev asif garasent.

18:34.t: I$ellet ed ppemĂŽa. Inna i umdakwel is, mi s immeslay: "$elbe$ k taĂŽkunt, iffe$ k alag".

18:35.t: Idens iman is mi ikcem leonan is, inna: "ur cukke$ ara, d awez$i, ad iqucc wayagi.

18:36.t: Ur cukke$ ara ad yili yimir, u ma bbwve$ ar Mass iw, ard affe$, war ccekk, ayen yifen aya, deg umekkan is".

18:37.t: Inna yas umdakwel is, mi s immeslay: "day tnekĂŽev Win ik Ixelqen seg wakal, sinna, si tiqqit, sinna, Imessel ik d argaz?

18:38.t: Maca, Neppa d Ăebbi, Mass iw. Ur pcarake$ yiwen, i Mass iw.

18:39.t: Lemmer id tenniv, mi tkecmev ar tebĂȘirt ik: akken Irad Ăebbi. Ur telli tezmert siwa s$uĂŽ Ăebbi. Ma twalav iyi d, nek, tifev iyi ayla, tarwa,

18:40.t: Izmer Mass iw ad iyi d Ifk ayen i ifen tibĂȘirt ik. A d Iazen $uĂŽes ssxev, seg igenni, a ppu$al d aĂȘecraruf issiccigen;

18:41.t: ne$, ad zzren waman is, ur ten teppafev, d awez$i".

18:42.t: Tqucc l$ella s. D$a la izeyyeĂŽ ifassen is, $ef wayen iseĂŽĂŽef fellas. Tqucc tfeĂŽĂŽant is. Inna: "a yamxix iw, a lemmer ur curke$ yiwen, i Mass iw"!

18:43.t: Ur as illi urbaĂą ara t isellken, war Ăebbi. Ur isellek iman is.

18:44.t: Akka, laĂąnaya s$uĂŽ Ăebbi, Tidep. Yif akw i ukafi, Yif akw i taggara.

18:45.t: Awi yasen d amedya n tmeddurt n ddunit. Am aman id Nesse$li seg igenni. EĂąluĂąlen yissen im$an n tmurt. D$a u$alen d asa$uĂŽ, issebruzzaĂą iten wavu. Ni$ Ăebbi Izmer i yal cci.

18:46.t: Ayla akked dderya d ccbaĂȘa n tmeddurt n ddunit. Ar Mass ik, leĂ»laĂȘ idumen ifen ten i ukafi, ifen ten i tmeĂŽoiwt.

18:47.t: Ass ideg ara NesselĂȘu idurar, a pwaliv tamurt d aza$aĂŽ. A ten Nefser, ur Neppaoa yiwen segsen.

18:48.t: A d rsen zdat Mass ik, d leĂ»fuf: "ni$ tusam aÂŁ d, akken ikwen Nexleq tikelt tamenzut. Irna tetebbtem ar ur awen Neppara ppaĂąud, d awez$i".

18:49.t: Ters ed Tezmamt. A pwaliv ibe$wviyen s uĂȘebbiĂŽ, $ef wayen illan degs. QqaĂŽen: "a yamxix nne$! Acimi tazmamt agi ur teooi ayen meĂ©Ă©iyen, u wayen meqqwĂŽen, armi ten teĂȘseb"? Ufan illa wayen xedmen. Mass ik ur Idennis yiwen.

18:50.t: Mi Nenna i lmalayek: "knumt i Adem", knant, siwa Iblis. Neppa, si leonun, iaĂąĂ»a lameĂŽ n Mass is. Day a ten terrem, neppa akked tarwa s, d imawlan, war Nek? U nitni d icenga nnwen! D abdil ucmit n imednas.

18:51.t: Ur ten Rri$ d inagan n lxelq n tmurt akked igenwan, ne$ n lxelq nnsen. Ur ĂĂźife$ im$eĂŽĂŽqen d imĂąiwnen.

18:52.t: Ass ideg ara d Yini: "neccdet wid iyI terram d icriken iW". Ad asen siwlen, ur asen d pparan. Nerra, garasen, asif n twa$it.

18:53.t: Ibe$wviyen ad walin times. ĂĂ«ĂĂ»an ar nitni, degs, ara $lin. Ur ppafen, segs, tisensert.

18:54.t: Ni$ Nefka d, di LeqwĂŽan agi, yal amedya, i imdanen. Maca, ipnamar umdan sennig akw.

18:55.t: D acu i iĂźĂźfen imdanen ad amnen, mi ten id tusa nnhaya, u ad ste$fĂŽen Mass nnsen? Ar ten id tas kan, tin ivĂŽan d imezwura, ne$ ar d irs, zdat sen, uĂąaqeb?

18:56.t: Ur Neppazen imazanen, siwa i ubecceĂŽ d uneddeĂŽ. Wid ijehlen pnamaren, s tkerkas, ĂźĂźeggiĂŽen yissent tidep. PmaĂąliken $ef issekniyen iW, akked wayen i$ef ppunedĂŽen.

18:57.t: Anwa idensen sennig win iwumi d pwafekkĂŽen issekniyen n Mass is, iwexxeĂŽ asen, u ippu i ixdem ufus is. Ih, Nerra aĂȘurrim $ef wulawen nnsen, ur t fehhmen; akked tiĂąĂ©egt deg imeĂ©Ă©u$en nnsen. Ma tneccdev ten ar nnhaya, ur pwanhan, d awez$i.

18:58.t: Mass ik IpsemmiĂȘen, d Bab uĂȘunu. Lemmer ad IĂȘud fellasen ilmend n wayen kesben, ad I$iwel ar uĂąaqeb nnsen. Maca, sĂąan ppaĂąud, ur ppafen segs tisensert.

18:59.t: Timdinin nni i Nesqucc mi densent, Nga ppaĂąud i usquccu nnsent.

18:60.t: Mi inna Musa i uqeddac is: "ur ĂȘebbse$ alamma bbwve$ ar umlili n sin ilellen, xas ad sĂąaddi$ tallit".

18:61.t: Mi bbwven ar umlili nnsen, ppun aslem nnsen. Iu$al ar yill d ilelli.

18:62.t: Mi zegren, inna i uqeddac is: "awi a$ d imekli nne$, ni$ naĂąteb deg inig nne$ agi".

18:63.t: Inna: "ur twalav ara, mi nreyyeĂȘ ar teĂ©ĂŽut, nek ppu$ en aslem? D CciĂźan kan iyi isseppun ur ak nni$. Ibbwi abrid is ar yill, d lwehma"!

18:64.t: Inna: "d ayagi ay neb$a". D$a u$alen d $ef isurifen nnsen.

18:65.t: Ufan d amdan seg imdanen nneÂŁ, iwumi Nefka aĂȘunu s$uĂŽneÂŁ. Neslemd as tussna i illan $uĂŽneÂŁ.

18:66.t: Inna yas Musa: "Ma ad ddu$ yidek, ad iyi tesĂȘefvev ay tesnev n Ă»Ă»wab"?

18:67.t: Inna d: "keĂ§Ă§, s tidep, ur tezmiĂŽev, yidi, a pĂ»ebĂŽev.

18:68.t: Amek ara tĂ»ebĂŽev i wayen i$ef ur tesĂąiv asali"?

18:69.t: Inna: "ad iyi tafev, ma Irad Ăebbi, d aĂ»ebĂŽi. Ur pnaqwame$ lameĂŽ ik".

18:70.t: Inna: "ma teddiv yidi, ur iyi d steqsay $ef wacemma, alamma smekti$ k id fellas".

18:71.t: LĂȘan, armi rekben di lbabuĂŽ. IxeĂŽq it. Inna: "txeĂŽqev t, iwakken ad $evĂ»en l$aci s! Ni$ ayen txedmev d dduni".

18:72.t: Inna: "day ur ak nni$ ara, keĂ§Ă§, s tidep, ur tezmiĂŽev, yidi, a pĂ»ebĂŽev, d awez$i"?

18:73.t: Inna: "ur iyi pqasa imi ppu$, ur ssukku lwaĂąĂŽan $ef lameĂŽ iw".

18:74.t: LĂȘan, armi d mmugren ilemĂ©i. In$a t. Inna: "ten$iv amdan ur nen$i yiwen! Ni$ d ayen idensen ay txedmev".

18:75.t: Inna: "day ur ak nni$ ara, keĂ§Ă§, s tidep, ur tezmiĂŽev, yidi, a pĂ»ebĂŽev, d awez$i"?

18:76.t: Inna: "ma steqsa$ k $ef t$awsa, deffir ta, ur teddu yidi. Ni$ ssutre$ ak d ssmaĂȘ".

18:77.t: LĂȘan, armi bbwven ar imezda$ n yiwet n temdint, ssutren asen lqut. Ugin a ten snubgten. Ufan en lĂȘiv, qĂŽib ad i$li. IĂ»eggem it. Inna: "ma teb$iv, tzemrev a ppepwaxellĂ»ev $ef waya".

18:78.t: Inna: "Tura a nemfaĂŽaq. Ad ak d fke$ lmaĂąna n wayen i$ef ur tezmirev a pĂ»ebĂŽev, d awez$i".

18:79.t: LbabuĂŽ nni, n igellilen i ixedmen di yill. B$i$ a t ĂŽĂ©e$, acku yiwen ugellid, deffir sen, itekkes yal lbabuĂŽ, s yi$il.

18:80.t: Wanag ilemĂ©i nni, llan imawlan is d lmumnin. Nugad ad iĂȘeppem fellasen tinufqa, tijehli.

18:81.t: Neb$a ad asen d Irr, Mass nnsen, it yifen: win iĂ»fan, iqeĂŽben nezzeh aĂȘunu.

18:82.t: Wanag lĂȘiv, n sin warrac igujilen n temdint. Illa ugerruj seddaw as, i nitni. Babat sen d argaz ilhan. Mass ik Ib$a, ard im$uĂŽen, ara d ssuff$en agerruj nnsen. D aĂȘunu s$uĂŽ Mass ik. Ur t xdime$ s lameĂŽ iw. D tagi ay d lmaĂąna n wayen i$ef ur tezmiĂŽev a pĂ»ebĂŽev".

18:83.t: Steqsan k $ef Bu sin wacciwen. Ini: "ad awen d awi$, fellas, asmekti".

18:84.t: S tidep, Nefka yas di tmurt, u Nsehhel as iberdan di yal cci.

18:86.t: armi sanda i$elli yiĂźij. Iufa i$elli $ef tala ilu$en. Iufa n $uĂŽes agdud. Nenna: "a Bu sin wacciwen, Ăąaqeb iten, ne$ lhu $uĂŽsen".

18:87.t: Inna: "win idensen a t nĂąaqeb, sinna, ad iu$al ar Mass is at IĂąaqeb aĂąaqeb unekkaĂŽ.

18:88.t: Wanag i win iumnen, ixeddmen ayen ilhan, akafi igerzen. Ad as Nini i isehlen si lameĂŽ nneÂŁ".

18:89.t: Sinna, ilĂȘa d yiwen n ubrid,

18:90.t: armi sanda d ineqqeĂŽ yiĂźij. Iufa n ineqqeĂŽ ed $ef ugdud, iwumi ur Nefki ar at isdarin segs.

18:91.t: Am akka. Ni$ ibbwev aÂŁ d akw usali s.

18:92.t: Sinna, idda d yiwen n ubrid,

18:93.t: armi ibbwev ger sin iĂȘdiden. Iufa, deffir sen, agdud qĂŽib ur fehhmen awal.

18:94.t: Nnan: "a Bu sin wacciwen, s tidep, Iaouo akked Maouo la ssefsaden di tmurt. A k nxelleĂ» ma terriv Ă»Ă»uĂŽ garane$ yidsen".

18:95.t: Inna: "yif it iyi Ifka Mass iw. Efket iyi afus, ad rre$ Ă»Ă»uĂŽ garawen yidsen.

18:96.t: Awit iyi d tiqaĂčmtin n wuzzal alamma irgel wayen illan ger idurar". Inna: "Ă»uvet alamma tekker degs tmes. Awit iyi d ad smire$ fellas nnĂȘas ifsin".

18:97.t: D$a ur zmiren a t id zegren, ur zmiren a t id flun.

18:98.t: Inna: "ayagi d aĂȘunu s$uĂŽ Mass iw. Mi d tusa lemĂąahda n Mass iw, a t Isawi. LemĂąahda n Mass iw d tidep".

18:99.t: Assen, a ten Neoo ad ddehmen wa $ef wa. AĂ»uvu di lbuq, d$a a ten Nessemlil akw.

18:100.t: A d Nessken nezzeh Loahennama, assen, i ijehliyen,

18:101.t: wid iwumi sĂȘurrment wallen nnsen, mgal asmekti W. Llan ur zmiren i usemĂȘes.

18:102.t: Day $ilen, wid ijehlen, ad rren imdanen iW, d imawlan war Nek? Ih, Nhegga Loahennama, d axxam i ijehliyen.

18:103.t: Ini: "ad awen mle$ at igiten imexsuĂŽen sennig wiyav?

18:104.t: Wid iwumi iweddeĂŽ laĂątab nnsen di tmeddurt n ddunit, wanag nitni nwan gerzen igi"?

18:105.t: Widak d wid i inekĂŽen issekniyen n Mass nnsen, akked temlilit yideS. MĂȘan igiten nnsen. Ur ten Nwezzen, ass n tnekra.

18:106.t: Atan uqeĂźĂźi nnsen: Loahennama, imi jehlen, u mmaĂąlken deg issekniyen iW, akked imazanen iW.

18:107.t: Ma d wid iumnen, ixeddmen ayen ilhan, axxam nnsen d leonanat n Loennet.

18:108.t: Degs ad wekkĂŽen, ur ssuturen ayen nniven.

18:109.t: Ini: "lemmer ill d lmidad, i wawalen n Mass iw, ad iqqaĂŽ yill, uqbel ad fukken wawalen n Mass iw, xas a d nawi i t icban n lmidad".
