27:40.t: Inna d bab n tmusni si Tezmamt: "nek ad ak t id awi$, uqbel a pfukkev asmeĂŽmec". Mi t iwala irs ed $uĂŽes, inna: "wagi si lfevl n Mass iw, ad iyi ijeĂŽĂŽeb ma ad snemmre$, ne$ ma ad jehle$. Win isnemmren, isnemmer kan i iman is. Win ijehl, ihi, Mass iw d AsĂąay, d Ukyis".

27:41.t: Inna: "bedlet as udem usgeld is, a nĂ©eĂŽ ma tepwanha, ne$ haap seg wid ur nepwanha".

27:42.t: Mi d tusa, nnan as: "day am wagi, usgeld inem"? Terra d: "amzun d neppa". "Tusa ya$ d tmusni, uqbel neppat, nuzen.

27:43.t: IsĂŽuĂȘ ip wayen tunez, war Ăebbi. Tella, s tidep, seg ugdud ijehliyen".

27:44.t: Nnan as: "ekcem ar lbeĂŽo"! Mi t twala, t$il degs aman; tesban ed ifadden is. Inna: "s tidep, d lbeĂŽo ulelluc imzin". Tenna: "a Mass iw! Ih, dense$ iman iw. Akked Sliman, unze$ aS i Ăebbi, Mass imavalen".

27:45.t: Ni$ Nuzen ed, i Tamud, gmat sen ĂaliĂȘ: "Ăąabdet Ăebbi"! Maca, rran snat n trebbuya$, ppemnamarent.

27:46.t: Inna: "a yagdud iw! Acimi tep$awalem ar tucmip, uqbel ise$? Lemmer a ppeste$fĂŽem Ăebbi, ahat aĂȘunu fellawen".

27:47.t: Nnan: "tkeĂȘĂȘesev a$, keĂ§Ă§ akked wi iddan yidek". Inna: "lfal nnwen ar Ăebbi, u kunwi d agdud ara ippuhewwlen".

27:48.t: Llan, di temdint, tza iterrasen i issefsaden di tmurt, ur pleqqimen.

27:49.t: Nnan: "yyaw a nemmesgal s Ăebbi, ard a neĂ©vem deg iv fellas, neppa akked twacult is. Sinna, a nini i bab is: ur nelli d inagan n tmen$iwt n tawacult is. Ih, nekwni, d imawlan n tidep".

27:50.t: Undin ticeĂŽkep, Nundi ticeĂŽkep, nitni ur faqen.

27:51.t: Wali amek tevĂŽa di tceĂŽkep nnsen. Nen$ed iten, nitni, akked ugdud nnsen, meĂŽĂŽa.

27:52.t: Atnan hudden ixxamen nnsen, ilmend n ddens nnsen. Deg wayagi, war ccekk, assekni i ugdud issnen.

27:53.t: Nsellek wid iumnen u llan pĂȘezziben.

27:54.t: I LuĂź, mi inna i ugdud is: "teppeddum ar wayen n dir, u kunwi tepwalim.

27:55.t: Ih, kunwi teppeddum ar irgazen, teb$am ten, war tilawin. Ih, kunwi d agdud ur nessin".

27:56.t: Tiririt n ugdud is, siwa mi d nnan: "ssuff$et tawacult n LuĂź, si temdint nnwen, nitni d imdanen i ib$an tezdeg".

27:57.t: Nsellek it, neppa akked twacult is, siwa tameĂźĂźut is. Nseyya a ppili seg wid igwran.

27:58.t: Nesse$li d fellasen ageffur. I icmet ugeffur n wid ippunedĂŽen!

27:59.t: Ini: "ccekĂŽan i Ăebbi. Talwit i imdanen iS, wid Ifren". Ppif Ăebbi, ne$ ayen pcaraken?

27:60.t: Day Win Ixelqen tamurt akked igenwan, i wen d Isse$lin aman, seg igenni - Nessenkar, yissen, iqwiĂŽen ippembehwaoen, ur teĂȘwaoem a d tessem$im ttjuĂŽ is -, day illa ĂŽebbi, ar tama n Ăebbi? Maca, nitni d agdud issaĂądalen.

27:61.t: Day Win Irran tamurt d tanezdu$t, Irra degs isaffen, Irra yas idurar, Irra agadir ger sin ilellen, day illa ĂŽebbi ar tama n Ăebbi? XaĂźi, tegwti degsen, ur ssinen.

27:62.t: Day Win IssemĂȘasen i umevĂŽuĂŽ, mara S d isiwel; Itekksen ayen n dir; i kwen Ipparan d igensas di tmurt; day illa ĂŽebbi, ar tama n Ăebbi? Drus id tesmektayem.

27:63.t: Day Win i kwen Inehhun, di tillas n lberr akked yill, id Ippaznen avu, d abecceĂŽ n ccira uĂȘunu S; day illa ĂŽebbi, ar tama n Ăebbi? Ay AĂąlay Ăebbi, sennig wayen pcaraken!

27:64.t: Day Win Ibeddun lxelq, sinna, Ippales as; ikwen I$aten seg igenni akked tmurt; day illa ĂŽebbi ar tama n Ăebbi? Ini: "awit ed atebbet nnwen, ma tessawalem tidep"!

27:65.t: Ini: "tabavnit, di tmurt akked igenwan, ur p issin yiwen siwa Ăebbi. Ur Ă©ĂŽin melmi ara d kkren".

27:66.t: Ih, tamusni nnsen ur tessawev ar laxeĂŽt? XaĂźi, nitni di ccekk fellas. XaĂźi, nitni, fellas, dre$len.

27:67.t: Nnan wid ijehlen: "day ma nu$al d akal, am imezwura nne$, s tidep, fella$ tanekra?

27:68.t: Ni$ waĂąĂąden a$ aya, i nekwni akw i imezwura nne$, zik. Ayagi, d timucuha kan imenza".

27:69.t: Ini: "iniget di tmurt, walit amek tevĂŽa d ibe$wviyen".

27:70.t: Ur $webben fellasen, ur pxiqqi ilmend n nncub nnsen.

27:71.t: Nnan: "melmi lemĂąahda agi, ma d tidep ay tessawalem"?

27:72.t: Ini: "kra n wayen i$ef tĂȘarem, ahat atan ivfeĂŽ kwen id".

27:73.t: Mass ik, s tidep, meqqweĂŽ lfevl iS, $ef imdanen. Maca, tegwti degsen ur snemmiren.

27:74.t: Mass ik, s tidep, IĂ©ĂŽa ayen teffren idmaren nnsen, akked wayen d qqaĂŽen.

27:75.t: Ur illi wayen iffren, deg igenni akked tmurt, ur nuri di Tezmamt ipbegginen.

27:76.t: Ih, LeqwĂŽan agi iĂȘekku d i At IsĂŽail, tegwti n wayen i$ef mgarraden.

27:77.t: Neppa, war ccekk, ard nnhaya akked uĂȘunu i lmumnin.

27:78.t: Mass ik, s tidep, ad Iseyyi garasen s uĂȘuddu S. Neppa d Uzmir, d Amusnaw.

27:79.t: Ppkel $ef Ăebbi, ih, aql ak di tidep ipbegginen.

27:80.t: Ih, keĂ§Ă§, ur tepparav lmeggtin ad slen, ur tepparav iĂąeĂ©Ă©ugen ad slen i wancad, ma wexxĂŽen.

27:81.t: Ur fellak nnhaya ider$alen, mgal ttelfan nnsen. Ara islen, siwa wid iumnen s issekniyen nneÂŁ. Nitni d imvuĂąen.

27:82.t: Mi iĂ»aĂŽ wawal fellasen, ad asen d Nessuffe$ lweĂȘc si tmurt; ad asen yini ar imdanen ur metbutit $ef issekniyen nneÂŁ.

27:83.t: Ass ideg ara d Nefser, si yal lois, arbaĂą n wid inekĂŽen issekniyen nneÂŁ, d tirni,

27:84.t: alamma, mi d usan, ad Yini: "day tnekĂŽem issekniyen iW, ur ten teskecmem di tmusni? Ne$ d acu tellam txeddmem"?

27:85.t: IĂ»aĂŽ wawal fellasen, imi densen. Ur d pmeslayen.

27:86.t: Day ur walan ara ar Nerra yasen iv i ureyyeĂȘ nnsen, ass iwakken ad walin? Deg wayagi, s tidep, issekniyen i ugdud iumnen.

27:87.t: Ass uĂ»uvu n lbuq, ad iagwad i illan deg igenwan, i illan di tmurt, siwa wid i S ihwan i Ăebbi. A d asen akw $uĂŽeS, s uĂȘiwet.

27:88.t: A pwaliv idurar i t$ilev sebken, la teddun am usigna. D igi n Ăebbi i IĂ»egmen yal cci. Neppa, s tidep, IĂ©ĂŽa d acu txedmem.

27:89.t: Win id iusan s ise$, ad iawi it yifen. Widak, assen, mevmunit si tugdi.

27:90.t: Wid id iusan s tucmip, ad ppin wudmawen nnsen ar tmes. Ni$ a ppeppuqeĂźĂźim kan $ef wayen txeddmem?

27:91.t: PwamĂŽe$ kan ad Ăąabde$ Mass n temdint agi, i IĂŽqa. IneS yal cci. PwamĂŽe$ d ad ili$ seg imduĂąen,

27:92.t: ad male$ LeqwĂŽan. Win ipwanhan, ipwanha kan i iman is. Win innetlafen, ini: "nek d aneddaĂŽ kan".

27:93.t: Ini: "a neckeĂŽ Ăebbi. Ad awen Issken issekniyen iS. A ten tĂąaqlem". Mass ik ur I$effel ara $ef wayen txeddmem.

28:3.t: Ad ak d NeĂȘku si teqĂ»iĂź n Musa akked FerĂąun, s tidep, i ugdud iumnen.

28:4.t: Ih, FerĂąun issem$weĂŽ iman is di tmurt; imezda$ ifeĂŽq iten d iĂȘĂŽumen. Isrewrew Ăźayfa segsen, izellu arrac nnsen, issidir tilawin nnsen. Ih, neppa seg ifessaden.

28:5.t: Neb$a a NfeĂŽĂŽeo $ef wid irewrwen di tmurt, a ten Nerr d imeqwĂŽanen, a ten Nerr d iweĂŽĂŽaten.

28:6.t: A ten NesseqĂąad di tmurt. A Nessken i FerĂąun, Haman, akked iĂąsekĂŽiwen nnsen, ayen ppagwaden segsen.

28:7.t: NweĂȘĂȘa i imma s n Musa: "ssuĂźĂźev it, sinna, ma tugadev fellas, err it ar wasif. Ur ppagwad, ur $webben. Ad am t id Nerr, u a t Nerr seg imazanen".

28:8.t: Teddem it twacult n FerĂąun. Ad asen iu$al d acengu, d a$ilif. Ih, FerĂąun, Haman, akked iĂąsekĂŽiwen nnsen llan d imsaben.

28:9.t: Tenna tmeĂźĂźut n FerĂąun: "d nnĂ»ib n tiĂź, i nek akked keĂ§Ă§. Ur tneqq, ahat ad a$ infaĂą, ne$ a t nerr d mmit nne$". Nitni ur faqen ara.

28:10.t: Temmar ed tasa n yimma s n Musa. QĂŽib it id tessken, lemmer ur NzeyyeĂŽ ara ul is, iwakken a ppili si lmumnin.

28:11.t: Tenna i ultma s: "evfeĂŽ it"! TeqquĂŽa t si mbĂąid, nitni ur faqen.

28:12.t: Uqbel, Negdel as tid iĂ»Ă»uĂźuven. Tenna: "ad awen ssekne$ axxam ar awen itkwelfen fellas, u nitni ad as bedden"?

28:13.t: Nerra t id i imma s, iwakken ad as kkawent wallen is, ur t$webben, iwakken a pĂ©eĂŽ ar lemĂąahda n Ăebbi d tidep. Maca, tegwti degsen, ur ssinen.

28:14.t: Mi meqqweĂŽ, ittaĂąqel, Nefka yas tussna, Ă»Ă»wab. Akka ay Nepkafi imdanen lĂąali.

28:15.t: Ikcem tamdint, di lweqt ideg stehzan imezda$ is. Iufa n sin irgazen pna$en, yiwen seg uĂȘĂŽum is, wayev seg icenga s. Win n uĂȘĂŽum is, issuter as d afus, mgal win n icenga s. Iwwet it Musa s lbunia, in$a t. Inna: "ayagi, seg igi n CciĂźan. Neppa, s tidep, d acengu n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ, itellifen".

28:16.t: Inna: "a Mass iw! Nek dense$ iman iw, SemmeĂȘ iyi". IsemmeĂȘ as. Ih, Neppa IpsemmiĂȘ, IpĂȘunu.

28:17.t: Inna: "a Mass iw! S l$it iK felli, ur ppili$, d awez$i, si loiha ibe$wviyen".

28:18.t: Iufa d iman is di temdint, iugad, iquĂŽaĂą. Atan a d ipĂąaggiv $uĂŽes, win i s d issutren afus, ass izeryen. Inna yas Musa: "keĂ§Ă§, s tidep, d im$eĂŽĂŽeq n Ă»Ă»eĂȘ".

28:19.t: Acengu nnsen, mi ib$a a t iwwet, inna d: "a Musa! Day teb$iv ad iyi ten$ev, akken ten$iv yiwen, ivelli? Teb$iv kan a ppiliv d aqehhaĂŽ di tmurt, ur teb$iv ara a ppiliv seg iĂąaĂŽviyen".

28:20.t: Iusa d urgaz si ĂźĂźerf n temdint, ippazal. Inna d: "a Musa! S tidep, imvebbĂŽen mlalen $ef loal ik, a k n$en. Effe$, nek, seg wid ik ipweĂ»Ă»in".

28:21.t: Iffe$ segs, iugad, iquĂŽaĂą. Inna: "a Mass iw! Sellek iyi seg ugdud imednas".

28:22.t: Mi ibbwi tikli ar Madian, inna: "ahat Mass iw ad iyi Iawi d ubrid umĂąin".

28:23.t: Mi ibbwev s aman n Madian, iufa n arbaĂą n l$aci, la sswan. Iufa, di ĂźĂźerf nnsen, snat n tlawin, ĂźĂźfent lmal nnsent. Inna: "d acu txeddmemt"? Nnant ed: "ur nesswa alamma wexxĂŽen imeksawen. Babat ne$ d am$aĂŽ ameqwĂŽan".

28:24.t: Issew asent, iu$al ar tili, inna: "a Mass iw! Nek ĂŽe$be$ $ef yal lxiĂŽ, ar iyi d Tessersev".

28:25.t: Tusa t id yiwet segsent, s tikli ikukran, tenna: "atan ak d issawal baba, a k ikafi imi $ tesswev". Mi iĂŽuĂȘ $uĂŽes, u iĂȘka yas i ivĂŽan, inna: "ur ppagwad, tepwasellkev seg ugdud imednas".

28:26.t: Yiwet segsent, tenna: "a baba! EĂźĂźef it d acrik, ih, yif icriken ik, iohed, muman".

28:27.t: Inna: "b$i$, nek, ad ak fke$ yiwet si yissi yagi, s cceĂŽt a pxedmev $uĂŽi Ăźam iseggwasen. Ma tessawdev mraw, s leb$i k. Ur b$i$ a k hejjne$. Ad ak ili$, ma Irad Ăebbi, seg iĂąaĂŽviyen".

28:28.t: Irra: "ayagi, gari yidek. A tin sĂąadda$ ger snat n tallitin, ur ippili felli u$ilif. Ăebbi d Awkil, $ef wayen id nenna".

28:29.t: Mi ifukk Musa tallit, u iseyyeĂȘ akked twacult is, iwala times ar tama n udrar. Inna i twacult is: "qqimet, wala$ times, ahat ad awen d awi$, segs, asali ne$ asafu, amar a ppesseĂȘmum".

28:30.t: Mi ibbwev $uĂŽes, ipwanced ed si ttejĂŽa, di rif ayeffus n te$zut, deg umviq iĂŽqan: "a Musa! S tidep, Nek d Ăebbi, Mass imavalen.

28:31.t: VeggeĂŽ taĂąkwazt ik". Mi p iwala, la tesseĂȘĂŽiĂźiw amzun d azrem, ibren ur iwexxeĂŽ. "A Musa! Qeddem, ur ppagwad, aql ak, ih, di laman.

28:32.t: Err afus ik di loib ik, a d iffe$ d amellal, ur ihlik. SseqĂŽeb ed $uĂŽek i$il ik, ad ak tekkes tugwdi. Tigi d sin n ppbut s$uĂŽ Mass ik, i FerĂąun akked imvebbĂŽen is. Ih, nitni d agdud iballa$en".

28:33.t: Inna: "a Mass iw! Nek n$i$ yiwen segsen, ugade$ ad iyi n$en.

28:34.t: Gma Harun yif iyi afeĂ»Ă»eĂȘ umeslay. Azen it id yidi d amĂąiwen, ad iyi tebbet. Nek ugade$ ad iyi nekĂŽen".

28:35.t: Inna: "a Nesseohed tayepp ik s gma k. Ad awen Nefk, i sin, adabu; ur kwen id ppawven. S issekniyen nneÂŁ, d kunwi akked wid iddan yidwen ara irebĂȘen".

28:36.t: Mi ibbwev $uĂŽsen Musa, s issekniyen iberrzen, nnan: "ayagi, siwa ssĂȘur id innulfan. Ur nesli s waya, $uĂŽ ibabaten nne$ imezwura".

28:37.t: Inna Musa: "Mass iw IĂ©ĂŽa sennig wiyav, anwa iwumi Ifka nnhaya s$uĂŽeS, anwa ara d igwrin deg Uxxam. Imednas, s tidep, ur rebĂȘen".

28:38.t: Inna FerĂąun: "a yimvebbĂŽen, ur awen mli$ ara kra n ĂŽebbi, war nekkini. EcĂąal iyi times ar talaxt, a Haman; bnu yi lbeĂŽo aĂąlayen; ahat ad ali$ ar ĂĂebbi n Musa. Nek, s tidep, ĂȘesbe$ t seg wid iskiddiben".

28:39.t: Neppa, akked iĂąsekĂŽiwen is, sme$wĂŽen iman nnsen di tmurt, war ssebba. ÂŁilen, ar nitni, ur d ppu$alen $uĂŽneÂŁ.

28:40.t: Neppa, akked iĂąsekĂŽiwen is, NeĂźĂźef iten. Nger iten ar yill. Wali amek tevĂŽa d imednas.

28:41.t: Nerra ten d imeqwĂŽanen i ineccden ar tmes. Ass n tnekra, ur ppusellken.

28:42.t: Neqqen asen xezzu di ddunit agi. Ass n tnekra, nitni seg ucmiten.

28:43.t: Ni$ Nefka Tazmamt i Musa, mbaĂąd ma Nesqucc isuta imezwura. D tafat i imdanen, d nnhaya u d aĂȘunu. Amar a d mmektin.

28:44.t: Ur telliv ara di loiha utaram, mi Nseyya lameĂŽ i Musa. Ur telliv seg inagan.

28:45.t: Maca, Nxelq ed tisuta, $wezzif laĂąmeĂŽ nnsent. Ur tellid seg imezda$ n Madian, la sen teqqarev issekniyen nneÂŁ. Maca, Nella Neppazen.

28:46.t: Ur telliv ar tama n udrar, mi d Nessawel. Maca d aĂȘunu s$uĂŽ Mass ik, iwakken a pnedrev agdud, u$uĂŽ ur d iusi uneddaĂŽ, uqbel ik. Amar a d mmektin.

28:47.t: Mulac, ma tĂȘuza ten tiyta id urwen ifassen nnsen, a d inin: "a Mass nne$! A lemmer i $ d Tuznev amazan, a neddu d issekniyen iK, a nili seg wid iumnen"!

28:48.t: Mi ten id tusa tidep s$uĂŽneÂŁ, nnan: "a lemmer id iusi am wayen id iusan i Musa"! Day ur ugin ara, zik, ayen id iusan i Musa? Nnan: "d sin ssĂȘurat". Mwafaqen, nnan: "nekwni nugi ten i sin".

28:49.t: Ini: "awit ed Tazmamt, s$uĂŽ Ăebbi, i yifen snat agi, i nnhaya, ad ddu$ yides, ma tessawalem tidep".

28:50.t: Ma ur ak d rran ara, efhem ar ddan kan d lhawiyyat nnsen. Anwa innetlafen, sennig win iteddun d lhawiyya s, war nnhaya s$uĂŽ Ăebbi? Ăebbi, s tidep, ur Inehhu agdud imednas.

28:51.t: Aql aÂŁ Nessawwev asen awal, amendeĂŽ ma d mmektin.

28:52.t: Umnen yis wid iwumi Nefka Tazmamt, uqbel tagi.

28:53.t: Ma $ĂŽan asen t, ad inin: "numen yis. Ih, ar neppa d tidep, s$uĂŽ Mass nne$. Uqbel is, s tidep, nella d imvuĂąen".

28:54.t: Wigi a ten id ias ukafi nnsen berdayen, $ef wayen Ă»ebĂŽen, swexxiĂŽen tucmip s yise$, u seg wayen iten N$at, pseddiqen.

28:55.t: Mi slan i yir awal, ad as veĂŽfen, u qaĂŽen: "i nekwni igiten nne$, i kunwi igiten nnwen. Fellawen talwit. Ur neĂŽ$eb $ef at war tussna".

28:56.t: KeĂ§Ă§, s tidep, ur tnehhuv win tĂȘemlev. Maca, Ăebbi Inehhu win i S ihwan. Neppa, Yif akw akken IĂ©ĂŽa wid ipwanhan.

28:57.t: Nnan: "ma nedda d nnhaya yidek, a nepwaxvef seg wakal nne$". Day ur ten NesseqĂąad ara di loamaĂą n laman, u$uĂŽ d ppawvent yal l$ellat? D l$it s$uĂŽneÂŁ. Maca, tegwti degsen, ur Ă©ĂŽin.

28:58.t: AcĂȘal Nesqucc n temdininn, cerrĂąent di temĂąict nnsent. Atnan ixxamen nnsen, ay ten ized$en, deffir sen, siwa ixeĂźĂźayen. D Nekwni ay d iweĂŽĂŽaten.

28:59.t: Ur Isquccu Mass ik timdinin, alamma iuzen i imezda$ nnsent, amazan i sen immalen issekniyen nneÂŁ. Ur Nesquccu timdinin, mebla ma llan imezda$ nnsent, d imednas.

28:60.t: Kra n wayen i wen ippunefken n cci, d zzhu n tmeddurt n ddunit, akked ccbuĂȘ is. Ayen illan $eĂŽ Ăebbi, yif it, ad idum kter. Day ur pmeyyizen ara?

28:61.t: Day win iwumi Nefka lemĂąahda igerzen, u immuger ip, am win i Nezha s l$it n tmeddurt n ddunit; sinna, ass n tnekra, neppa seg wid ara d irsen?

28:62.t: Ass ideg ara sen d Isiwel, ad Yini: "anda ten wid iyY tepcarakem, u tellam tepkabarem"?
